Name: MyDNA
Description:
En 2016 nace MyDNA como una respuesta a la necesidad de que existiera un epicentro donde las personas pudieran unir y balancear su propósito de vida con su carrera profesional, y en donde las empresas pudiesen crecer a través del óptimo desarrollo de sus colaboradores. 

Es así como MyDNA se consolida hoy como un ecosistema digital enfocado en soluciones integrales para Recursos Humanos, con más de 30 herramientas que apoyan a empresas y profesionales en las decisiones estratégicas de negocio y carrera. 

Nuestra operación no tiene fronteras. Nuestra presencia regional se extiende en países como Argentina, Brasil, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Perú y Uruguay, donde hemos  acompañado el sueño de crecimiento profesional de más de 5 millones de personas y transformamos la operación de recursos humanos de más de 10.000 empresas.

La lógica de MyDNA combina inteligencia artificial, big data, modelos predictivos y bases de datos mediante procesos metodológicos creados por expertos en Recursos Humanos en todos sus frentes de trabajo, para construir todo un ecosistema, un universo y el mejor aliado de los profesionales y departamentos de Human Resources. 


ABSTRACT

MyDNA es una startup chilena con cobertura en varios países de Latinoamérica, como Colombia, Brasil, Argentina, Perú y Uruguay; que brinda soluciones digitales enfocadas en optimizar la operación de los departamentos de recursos humanos de empresas de cualquier industria o tamaño. Su producto estrella es un ecosistema tecnológico con más de 30 soluciones que funcionan de manera integrada, con alcance en frentes de trabajo como outplacement, capacitaciones gamificadas, estudios salariales, reclutamiento y selección, clima laboral, y más. 
 
MyDNA, Better decisions. Great careers.

*Más información: contacto@mydnadigital.com 
*Solicita un Demo Gratis: https://meetings.hubspot.com/contacto-mydna

Name: payever
Description:
payever is a fintech headquartered in Hamburg. Founded 2013 with the aim to establish a commerce platform for merchants of any size and industry, payever offers a continuously expanding range of Payment & Checkout Solutions for both eCommerce & the Point of Sale. Through its unique platform, payever also provides additional tools and Value-Added Services.

Over 5,000 merchants in 9 countries (from SMBs to big international retailers/brands like MediaMarkt, Cyberport & 1Komma5) as well as major partners like Santander, Openbank and Allianz Trade trust in payever.

With its modern payment API and multiple plugins for popular eCommerce platforms such as Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, Shopware or Commercetools as well as other features like Pay by Link, thousands of merchants utilize payever's Checkout Solutions. These include Sales Finance/Lending, B2C/B2B Buy Now Pay Later option as well as direct bank transfer based on Open Banking with support of environmental projects. Acquiring/Card and Digital Wallets complete payever's payment portfolio.

BNPL/Lending can be offered as a stand-alone solution in brick-and-mortar retail (Merchant Portal) as well as through QR, SMS and Email (Self-Checkout), or integrated into the merchant's existing systems via API. A completely paperless Lending product allows customers to complete the process fully digital with OCR technology and e-signing, even without any assistance from sales personnel.

Value-Added Services include an AI-powered PIM through the aforementioned integrations/plugins to alternative sales channels such as Amazon, eBay, or Meta as well as an own No Code Builder (Selling Solutions). Within the Communication Solutions, merchants can add a live chat on the website and chat with their customers through apps like WhatsApp or Messenger, enabling direct sales. Further integrations with social media such as Facebook or Instagram, allow merchants to promote products and enable a one-click checkout (Marketing Solutions).

In all of our products and services, we prioritize ease of use, quality of support, and ease of setup. Our team and platform are here to make things EASY for your practice. Sidekick embeds contextual AI agents into a rep’s daily tasks to anticipate needs and automate workflows like curating and creating content, or building Deal Rooms. Name: shopflo
Description:
shopflo aims to supercharge conversions for e-commerce websites at checkout by improving user experience, helping build stronger intent and trust during the purchase 

Problem statement - 
(1) There is ~70% drop off at checkout for most independent e-commerce retailer (outside of large marketplaces) 
(2) E-commerce cart platforms allow minimal flexibility on checkout, with their experience still same as the last decade
(3) Whereas user experiences are defined by new consumer platforms such as Swiggy, Amazon, etc. 

There is a fundamental unbundling of monolith shopping cart platforms globally for mid-market and enterprise customers, who are moving towards headless (read modular) architecture. Shopflo aims to be the global default for checkout experiences.

Name: Tactile Mobility
Description:
Safer, more efficient and enjoyable driving experience, anywhere, anytime – with tactile data.

Feeling the tactility (i.e. dynamics) that is created between a vehicle and the road is key for optimizing safety, user experience, and efficiency, either if a person or a computer drives a vehicle. Tactile Mobility provides smart and autonomous vehicles (AVs) with the missing tactile sensing and data that makes vehicles smarter, roads better, and mobility-ecosystems enhanced.

Solutions
Our tactility-sensing innovation empowers multiple data solutions that maximize safety, user-experience, and driving efficiency in the mobility industry. Already crunched +10,000,000 km, and analyzed +100,000 trips, Tactile Mobility’s platform offers the following value propositions:
- For OEMs - Benefit from the new industry standard in vehicle data. Through our software licensing and data services, OEMs leverage a unique system empowering them to give smart and autonomous vehicles the tactile capacity that augments vision and auditory sensing. The missing sense delivered by Tactile Mobility is central for both smart vehicles (ADAS / level 2-3 AVs) and autonomous vehicles (level 4-5 AVs) alike.
- For mapping companies, road authorities, transport associations, insurers - Benefit from our cloud-based analytics that generates a SurfaceDNA HD map layer of great accuracy and coverage, outlining roadway grades, banking, curvature, and any hazards such as bumps, cracks, and potholes. This level of information is immensely valuable for planned maintenance, real-time hazard detection, post-accident analysis, and more.
- For fleet managers, car manufacturers, part suppliers - Benefit from our hardware and web tool, offering vital information for optimizing fuel consumption, fuel theft detection, route pricing, and preventive maintenance based on our innovative SurfaceDNA and VehicleDNA data models.

For more information go to www.tactilemobility.com or e-mail us at info@tactilemobility.com.

We are built to:

Save money - by lowering fees

Our Mission: Transforming how real estate payments are made with the goal of eliminating wire fraud and the use of paper checks


Our Vision: Allow consumers and organizations to send and receive payments securely and effortlessly.


Our Values: We do not take shortcuts. We take pride in what we do because we know everyone's contribution, no matter how small or big, contributes to the failure or success of the company.

We are never content and always building your future business. We are creative, take risks, look for a better way, and always share ideas.

We love to laugh and have fun. We find the humor in every situation and the gift in every challenge. Make your own fun and stay positive.

Description:
Autonomous Systems develops autonomous driving systems for city buses. Our core technology, SmartDEPOT, enables electric buses to move autonomously within depots – without a driver.

SmartDEPOT combines LIDAR-based 3D perception, multi-source localization, and mission-level control software to deliver full autonomy for low-speed maneuvers such as parking, charging, washing, and line dispatching. The system is fully compatible with existing depot infrastructure and scalable from a single vehicle to an entire fleet.

For PTOs, SmartDEPOT means measurable operational gains: reduced depot congestion, fewer low-value driver movements, and higher fleet availability each morning. For OEMs, it provides a modular autonomy platform ready to integrate with drive-by-wire architectures.

The system is supervised through SmartDEPOT Mission Control, a lightweight control centre interface designed for the emerging role of Smartbus Coordinator – one operator managing multiple vehicles simultaneously.

Autonomous Systems’ approach is pragmatic: focus autonomy where it’s possible now – in the depot. Every bus that drives itself off the lot safely and on time brings public transport closer to full autonomy on city streets.

SmartDEPOT - the standard for smartbuses.

Steer-By-Wire is going to become the standard autonomous driving system in 2026. It will also be able to used in industry, agriculture and for the products of the defence industry. 

The R&D Office of Mechatnom is located in the Technopark of Kocaeli University, its 500 square meters production facility is located in Gölcük and international contact, sales and research and development office is located in Dusseldorf, Germany.

We have all the tools, equipment, machines and lines to be able to develop the Electronic Control Units and all the electronic hardware and to build and produce prototypes.

We run the process management according to A-Spice, functional safety according to ISO26262 and system management in agile software development platform in accordance with V Model.

Name: emmtrix Technologies GmbH
Description:
Automation Tools for Better Code
emmtrix Technologies GmbH is an innovative company in the field of software development for embedded systems from Karlsruhe, Germany, founded in 2016. 

As experts in compiler technology and static source code analysis, we help our customers analyze and optimize their code by offering software-tools and services.  

Our aim is to provide comprehensive insight into the runtime performance of an application (emmtrix Performance Estimator) as well as the complexity/interdependency of the code (emmtrix Dependency Analyzer) early on in the development process.  Armed with this information, engineers can make informed decisions right from the start of the project. Our analysis solutions can be integrated into existing workflows and run in continuous integration set-ups on a defined schedule complete with versioning and changelogs.  

Going beyond analysis we also help with automated software parallelization (emmtrix Parallel Studio and emmtrix Code Vectorizer) to optimize performance on multicore and manycore processors, as well as accelerators such as vector processors, but also GPUs and DSPs. This parallelization can be qualified according to ISO 26262 / DO-178C upon request.  

emmtrix Tech Wiki:
To support our customers and the developer community beyond our software tools, we share our technical knowledge publicly in the emmtrix Tech Wiki. It provides in-depth background on our tools, supported architectures, and compiler technology, helping engineers better understand and optimize embedded software systems.

Name: Checkfirst
Description:
Checkfirst exists to solve one of the biggest challenges in the Testing, Inspection, Certification, and Compliance (TICC) sector: operational inefficiency driven by outdated planning, scheduling, and verification processes.

Every day, global TIC organisations depend on auditors, inspectors, and assessors to deliver critical work. Yet much of this work is slowed down by manual planning, fragmented workflows, inconsistent data, and systems that cannot manage the complexity of real field operations.
Checkfirst builds AI products that remove these barriers.

Our platform is designed around one core mission:
To bring clarity, accuracy, and speed to every stage of the audit and inspection lifecycle.

ScheduleAI
Our flagship product, ScheduleAI, gives TICC planners a modern optimisation engine for scheduling auditors and inspectors. Traditional planning tools cannot compute skills, certifications, customer windows, durations, SLAs, travel constraints, workload distribution, and compliance rules at scale.

ScheduleAI processes all these dimensions instantly and produces optimal schedules that improve utilisation, reduce travel, cut rescheduling, and accelerate certificate turnaround.

Leaders in TICC choose ScheduleAI because it does not automate the old process. It replaces it with an intelligent operating model that reveals hidden capacity and transforms delivery performance.

VerifyAI
VerifyAI supports document assessors with accurate level 1 review. It accelerates early stage verification by checking consistency, completeness, and compliance indicators across documentation sets. VerifyAI does not replace decision making. It gives assessors a faster, more reliable start and removes repetitive manual checks.

Why Checkfirst
Our products integrate seamlessly into existing TICC workflows. They connect with sector specific tools, support multi country operations, and handle the complexity of different standards and audit types.

Name: Resolve
Description:
Resolve enables B2B companies to boost sales and cash flow by offering their buyers 30, 60, or 90 day payment terms, while ensuring the seller gets paid upfront risk-free. Our platform automates credit checks, underwriting, invoicing, and collections, helping companies improve cash flow, reduce manual accounts receivable work, and increase conversion rates.

Traditional net terms are slow and risky. Sellers often act like banks, extending credit, tracking invoices, and chasing payments. Resolve replaces that manual process with an automated, end-to-end net terms solution. From real-time credit decisions to fast invoice financing and collections, Resolve simplifies B2B payments so teams can focus on growth instead of administrative work.

Resolve integrates seamlessly with leading ecommerce and ERP platforms such as NetSuite, BigCommerce (2025 Innovative Integration Award winner), QuickBooks, and Shopify. Buyers can check out instantly using preapproved terms, and sellers receive advance payment within 24-hours on approved invoices. Resolve manages the credit risk and collections behind the scenes so sellers can offer flexible payment options without impacting their cash flow or taking on bad debt exposure.

Affirm and Resolve share their founding history in Max Levchin. Max was previously co-founder and CTO at PayPal and founded Affirm in 2012. Resolve was born in Max’s San Francisco based venture studio, HVF, by co-founders Chris Tsai and Brian Nguyen. Having both worked closely with Affirm, the pair saw an opportunity to bring the ‘buy now, pay later’ model to the B2B world. They created Resolve to modernize business payments, reimagining traditional net terms with intelligent credit technology, instant financing, and embedded finance infrastructure built for scale.

Name: Veecle
Description:
Veecle builds the modern software foundation for the next generation of vehicles.

Today’s vehicles run on dozens of ECUs, fragmented toolchains, and workflows that move at the speed of hardware, not ideas. We change that.
Our platform brings the principles of modern software engineering — continuous testing, unified tooling, reproducible builds, and clear APIs — into a domain where safety, reliability, and long lifecycles matter.

Veecle OS (open source): 
Is the memory-safe, Rust-based runtime that provides a common, transparent execution layer across microcontrollers, Zone Controllers, and high-performance computers. One software stack, all targets.

Veecle AI Development Studio: 
Is the cloud-based environment for designing, simulating, testing, and deploying distributed vehicle software — in days instead of months.
It enables teams to model complete architectures, mock missing hardware, generate consistent binaries, and iterate with the speed of consumer-tech development while respecting safety-critical constraints.

Together, OS + Studio form a single, model-driven workflow that unifies design, code, CI, deployment, and runtime observability.

We build for an industry that is shifting from fixed-function machines to continuously improving software products.

An industry that demands openness, speed, and sovereignty — not black boxes and lock-in.

Our mission is simple:
Give vehicle teams the software foundation they need to build faster, safer, and with full control over their architecture.

Let’s build the future of vehicles — the way modern software is built.

For the past decade, Make_It_Embedded has been at the forefront of automotive embedded software. With expertise in Autosar, ASPICE development, HIL bench design, cybersecurity, and software development for ADAS systems.

Our Commitment to Excellence

Since our inception, our company has been committed to providing cutting-edge solutions to tackle the complex challenges of the automotive sector. We understand the critical importance of safety, reliability, and performance in embedded systems, and that's why we continually strive to achieve the highest standards of quality.

Our Areas of Expertise

    ASPICE Development: Our methodical approach to software development compliant with ASPICE ensures the quality and regulatory compliance of our products.

    HIL Bench Design: We design customized Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) benches to test and validate the performance of embedded systems under simulated conditions.

    Cybersecurity: With the increasing threat of cyber attacks, we integrate robust security measures to protect embedded systems against malicious intrusions.

    Architecture and Software Development for ADAS Systems: We design and develop advanced software architectures for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS), ensuring a safe and intuitive driving experience.

Our Commitment to Our Customers

At MakeItEmbedded, we view our customers as full-fledged partners. We collaborate closely with them to understand their unique needs and deliver tailor-made solutions that exceed their expectations. Our commitment to excellence and innovation makes us the ideal choice for automotive companies looking to stay ahead in an ever-evolving market.

Ready to turn your vision into reality? Contact us today to discover how Make_It_Embedded can help you reach new heights in the automotive embedded software field.

Description:

People just like you can contribute to collecting data and being aware of the ecosystem around us. BirdBot is a project that allows people to be a part of this process and contribute to science. Your webcam or DSLR camera can be equipped with cutting edge machine learning to help generate insightful data on birds around the world. Some may think that this is just a simple nature camera, but BirdBot is a community and a commitment to making the world a better place, starting with birds!

Help track bird populations and save the birds! Become a community scientist today, and learn more at: https://www.bird.bot/

Name: LOCIO
Description:
LOCIO ist der innovative Anbieter für das digitale Management von Heimladungen bei elektrischen Dienstwagen. Unsere Lösung ist 100% kompatibel mit den Anforderungen moderner Unternehmensflotten.

Im Zentrum steht das fortschrittlichste Tool zur Verwaltung von Heimladedaten im B2B-Bereich. LOCIO ermöglicht die Abrechnung an jeder Wallbox mit höchster Messgenauigkeit – bei minimalem internen Ressourcenaufwand und vollständig automatisierter Abwicklung.

Die Plattform kombiniert modernste Messtechnik mit automatisierter Abrechnung, Kilometerstanderfassung und direkter Anbindung an die Schnittstellen der Fahrzeuge – für maximale Transparenz und Effizienz.

Bereits über 350 Unternehmenskunden im deutschsprachigen Raum setzen LOCIO ein – mit stark wachsender Nutzeranzahl. Eine Auswahl unserer Referenzen finden Sie hier: www.locio.de/referenzen

LOCIO schafft die Grundlage für eine skalierbare und wirtschaftlich tragfähige Elektrifizierung des Dienstwagenmodells – zugänglich für alle Beteiligten, unabhängig der verbauten Ladeinfrastruktur und damit nachhaltig wirksam in der Reduktion der Fuhrparkkosten.

Name: Match My Makeup
Description:
Match My Makeup is the world's premier colour cosmetics shade matching tool that is revolutionizing the beauty industry. Discover your perfect foundation or lip color in any brand, from anywhere in the world, and see the technology that is powering some of the world’s largest retailers. 

What sets us apart? Let us show you:
1. Unrivalled Accuracy: Our cutting-edge technology offers brand-to-brand foundation and lip colour matching with unmatched precision. With over 15,000 shades analyzed, we deliver results you can trust.

2. Extensive Skin Tone Spectrum: We understand that everyone's skin is unique. That's why we utilize the most comprehensive skin tone scale ever created by Dr. Ellis Monk. Our Quiz ensures a flawless match, regardless of your skin tone.

3. Virtual Try-On: Why imagine when you can experience? With our Virtual Try-On feature, you can visualize how your matched foundation or lip shade will look on your skin before making a purchase. 

Here are some impressive statistics that speak for themselves:

- 134% increase in total revenue: The accuracy, ease and convenience of Match My Makeup, results in substantial growth for retailers.

- 37% uplift in conversions: With our tool guiding users to their perfect match, they are more likely to make a purchase, boosting conversion rates for brands.

- 20% reduction in sample requests: No more wasting time and resources on sending out samples. Our precise matching process eliminates the need for trial and error, saving both brands and customers valuable time.

- 40% reduction in customer service requests: Our intuitive system reduces the need for assistance in shade matching. Our users can find their ideal foundation color effortlessly, resulting in fewer customer service inquiries.

- Refund rates as low as 1%: Our unmatched accuracy and scientific matching process ensure that customers are satisfied with their chosen shade, leading to minimal returns or exchanges.

Name: 1C ERP - Soluzioni Gestionali per Aziende
Description:
La nostra società è responsabile dello sviluppo e della distribuzione di soluzioni gestionali ERP basate sulla piattaforma 1C:Enterprise per il mercato Italiano.

1C:Enterprise è una piattaforma completa e configurabile che permette l’automazione di tutti i processi aziendali quali tesoreria, contabilità, produzione, personale, gestione acquisti e magazzini fino ad arrivare ovviamente alla gestione delle vendite e della clientela.

1C:Enterprise è un Cloud universale e un sistema di soluzioni on-premise per automatizzare le attività operative sviluppato da 1C Company e commercializzato in tutto il mondo attraverso il coordinamento della struttura 1Ci.

1C:Enterprise ha la capacità di soddisfare le diverse esigenze del business moderno. Ciò è possibile grazie alla “configurabilità “ delle sue soluzioni: la capacità di personalizzare il sistema in base alle esigenze specifiche delle aziende e dei loro processi aziendali.

1C:Enteprise è la soluzione scelta da oltre 1,5 milioni di aziende nel mondo e vede oltre 5 milioni di persone che ogni giorno si affidano ad essa per lo svolgimento delle loro attività lavorative. 1C:Enterprise si adatta inoltre a qualsiasi sistema operativo e periferica.

1C:Enterprise ha soluzioni studiate specificatemente per il mercato delle Piccole e Medie Imprese. Queste soluzioni si caratterizzano per un costo di licenza e implementazione estremamente basso e processi specifici per le esigenze delle PMI. Il focus si pone anche sulle esigenze delle micro e delle grandi imprese, così come sulle esigenze di specifici settori aziendali (tramite la creazione di gestionali verticali).

1C:Enterprise è più di una semplice applicazione che automatizza le regole aziendali. Piuttosto è una suite di soluzioni in continuo sviluppo ed aggiornamento grazie anche alla collaborazione fra utenti e sviluppatori. La sua rete di partner conta oltre 6.000 aziende.

Name: HighTec EDV-Systeme GmbH
Description:
HighTec EDV-Systeme is the world’s largest commercial provider of compilers using innovative LLVM (Low Level Virtual Machine) open-source technology. We offer safety-certified tools for embedded software development, the real-time operating system PXROS-HR, and a wide range of design-in services.

HighTec’s ASIL D qualified C/C++ compiler for leading multicore microcontrollers for automotive and industrial applications is safety-certified according to ISO 26262 ASIL D. Our compiler supports MCUs such as Arm, TriCore/AURIX/TRAVEO, RISC-V cores, Power Architecture (PowerPC), GTM, and Renesas.

For Rust developers, we  provide the ISO 26262–qualified HighTec Rust Development Platform, optimized for Infineon’s AURIX TC3x and TC4x microcontrollers. It supports both Rust and C/C++ mixed development, enabling hybrid safety-critical automotive software development.

HighTec‘s PXROS-HR is a safety-certified multicore RTOS for applications with safety and multicore requirements. PXROS-HR is certified according to ISO 26262 ASIL D / IEC 61508 SIL 3 and is complemented for ASIL D development by a Tool Qualification Kit.

HighTec is a privately owned company with headquarters Germany and large R&D and Application Engineering teams in Hungary, a sales office in China and a satelite office in the United States.

For over three decades, HighTec has been pioneering the transformation of open-source software into automotive-grade solutions

Description:

Our advanced technology is backed by a team of experts who vet strategies and report measured & verified outcomes using the internationally-adopted IPMVP methodology. 

Building owners and operators choose BTune for:
• Pay-from-savings pricing for day-one ROI / NOI boost
• Compliance support for BEPS/ESG targets
• Less burden on FM teams through automation + expert oversight
• Financial upsides including lower OPEX, improved NOI, and increased asset value

Ready to see the impact in your building? Contact us for a no-risk pilot.

In today's world, users expect SaaS products to be integrated, allowing them to apply AI, connect apps and automate routine tasks. However, for software companies, the process of building and maintaining native integrations consumes significant development resources, and simply directing users to 'use Zapier' is no longer a sufficient solution, as they now expect a cohesive experience.

Appmixer's next-gen integration platform lets SaaS companies offer native integrations in the most flexible way: by embedding a visual no-code automation designer directly into their products, allowing end customers to create AI-powered automations and connect apps together.

SaaS companies using Appmixer launch powerful no-code automation 12 times faster and give their customers the freedom to build AI-powered automations within their products—all while preserving development resources to focus on the true core of their business. Thanks to Appmixer's unique self-hosted offering, companies can handle millions of requests daily, store data in any location without external access, and adhere to the strictest security standards.

OP2 is designed to significantly reduce food waste, which accounts for an estimated $1.5 billion in preventable annual losses, while also cutting related costs & fuel consumption.

Founded in 2024, InovativAI is a team of senior AI/ML engineers, software developers & industry experts. We don’t just build software, we engineer intelligent futures.

Notre offre : 
-> des solutions de mobilité partagée (auto, vélo, trottinette) pour les entreprises et les collectivités 

Nos solutions s'adressent autant :

-> aux entreprises désireuses d'offrir à leurs salariés des possibilités de déplacement en vélo électrique ;

-> aux collectivités publiques voulant proposer de nouvelles possibilités de déplacement plus agréables et respectueuses de l'environnement ;

-> aux sites touristiques souhaitant disposer d'offres de location de vélos électriques permettant de découvrir des sites exceptionnels et de mettre en valeur le patrimoine local à travers un transport doux et agréable.

L’objectif de MOBENDI est de rendre la mobilité des personnes plus agréable, intelligente et économique au travers de 3 axes :

   - MOBILITÉ (MOB) : Encourager les modes de déplacement doux et non polluants autour du vélo électrique et de la voiture électrique partagés.
   - ENERGIE (EN) : Intégrer les problématiques énergétiques au cœur des projets de mobilité durable.
   - DIGITAL (DI) : Mettre au cœur de nos solutions les nouvelles technologies (infrastructures connectées, services digitaux, combiner auto partage et vélo partage en une seule application…) 

Ils nous ont fait confiance : Arval, Expleo, Gsk, Shneider Electric, Deloitte, Veolia, Suez, Total, Communauté de Communes du Sud Corse, Vallées de la Maurienne, Métropole de Nice Côte d'Azur, Port Vauban, Port Camargue.

Notre équipe d'ingénieurs sera fière de vous accompagner pour votre projet innovant et durable. 

Visitez notre nouveau site internet pour découvrir quelle solution vous convient :  http://www.mobendi.com/

Description:
Oiyaa is an AI-powered Value-Adds-as-a-Service platform transforming how payments create loyalty, engagement, and measurable growth.

We embed intelligence, rewards, insights, and personalised experiences directly into the payment flow — across payment terminals, softPOS, ePOS, and online checkout — turning every transaction into a real-time engagement moment.

Unlike traditional loyalty and marketing systems that operate outside the transaction, Oiyaa connects issuers, acquirers, merchants, and consumers through a single orchestration layer. This creates a unified ecosystem where value is generated and shared instantly at the moment of payment.

Our proprietary AI engine, Oiyai, delivers real-time personalisation, dynamic offers, coalition loyalty, and advanced analytics while maintaining full data privacy and regulatory compliance. Partners gain a Single Customer View across multiple merchants, unlocking deeper insights, higher retention, and increased transaction value.

Oiyaa is fully hardware- and software-agnostic and already integrated with leading payment terminals, softPOS providers, ePOS systems, and payment applications, enabling rapid global deployment with minimal friction.

We don’t process payments. We orchestrate value around them.

By converting payments into intelligent engagement channels, Oiyaa enables banks, acquirers, and merchants to monetise every transaction, increase customer lifetime value, and build lasting relationships with consumers — without adding operational complexity.

Our vision is to make every payment, everywhere, more valuable by building the global infrastructure layer for AI-driven commerce.

The future of payments is not just about moving money.
It’s about creating value at the moment it moves.

Name: NeuraScale
Description:
NeuraScale helps lean teams turn scattered operational data into clear, actionable weekly and daily briefs.

We ingest ERP, CRM, and analytics sources, normalize them into a secure schema with row-level access policies, and generate structured, AI-powered briefs using scoped function calling. No dashboards to babysit, no bloated BI platforms—just timely answers, delivered with minimal surface area.

Our internal pilots have cut weekly reporting prep time by 30–40%, reduced brief writing time by 66%, and brought job success rates to >99%.

NeuraScale is built around three core patterns:
• Schema-first ingestion with Supabase/Postgres + row-level security
• Event-driven queue engine with retry/backoff + observability
• Structured AI summarization via GPT + internal evaluation harness

We are currently in limited pilot.

Want to see how much time you can reclaim from manual prep? → www.neurascale.us

Sviluppata e gestita in Italia, Galene AI Platform aderisce ai più elevati standard etici, di sicurezza e privacy, garantendo la piena conformità alle normative europee, tra cui l’AI Act e il GDPR.
Inoltre, permette di accedere a soluzioni altamente personalizzabili, semplificando l'integrazione dell'AI nei processi aziendali per rispondere a esigenze specifiche.

Generative Shield, è la nostra piattaforma proprietaria di AI Governance e Risk Mitigation integrata nella Galene.AI Platform, nominata nella Market Guide di Gartner del 2025 dedicata all’AI TRiSM.
Generative Shield nasce per garantire sicurezza e trasparenza lungo l’intero ciclo di vita dell’AI. Basato sui principi di AI TRiSM, AI Act e GDPR, va oltre le semplici policy, integrando monitoraggio in tempo reale e meccanismi di enforcement per mitigare i rischi e assicurare che i sistemi AI operino nel rispetto di limiti etici e normativi.

À travers sa plateforme VISILOG, EGBS accompagne les entreprises industrielles et de distribution dans la maîtrise de leurs flux logistiques terrain, en reliant l’exécution opérationnelle aux décisions stratégiques.

VISILOG ne se limite pas à la traçabilité des flux.
Elle constitue un véritable moteur de transformation supply chain, permettant l’adoption de pratiques modernes à fort impact sur :

• la réduction du BFR,
• l’amélioration du cash-flow,
• la maîtrise durable des coûts logistiques,
• et la rentabilité globale des opérations.

En s’appuyant sur des données terrain factuelles et temps réel, la plateforme permet de fiabiliser les indicateurs opérationnels, d’objectiver les décisions managériales et de créer les conditions nécessaires à des approches avancées telles que :

• l’approvisionnement collaboratif,
• la synchronisation fournisseurs–transporteurs–sites,
• la réduction structurelle des stocks,
• l’amélioration de la vélocité des flux,
• et le pilotage économique de la performance supply chain.

Déployée auprès de groupes à forte intensité logistique, VISILOG agit comme une tour de contrôle opérationnelle, transformant les événements terrain en leviers mesurables de création de valeur.

Name: SafetyScope
Description:
SafetyScope is focused on a mission to bring safer surveillance to life.

Our core product, Omni, is an enterprise AI SaaS that overlays production-ready computer vision models on your existing camera fleet, with zero-touch provisioning, continuous camera health checks and automated incident packets for faster decisions and cleaner audits. 

Why customers choose Omni
- Decide in seconds: Officers review auto-trimmed clips in ~30 seconds instead of minutes, saving 10+ hours per officer per week. 
- Cut false dispatches: Smarter, contextual alerts have reduced unnecessary patrols by ~95%. 
- Slash paperwork: One-click, compliance-ready incident reports save 2–4 hours weekly per officer. 
- Reduce maintenance costs: Proactive camera health monitoring drives ~60% fewer site visits. 

Core capabilities:
- Fast RTSP / ONVIF camera integration with automatic discovery and centralized provisioning.
- Production CV models: people/vehicle detection, LPR, loitering/crowd detection, unattended objects, PPE compliance, tunable or extendable with custom models.
- Real-time dashboards, historical analytics, scheduled exports and on-demand incident packages for audits and investigations.

Who it’s for: enterprise security teams, multi-site operators and pilot partners who want to scale monitoring without ripping out hardware. Improve response times, reduce ops costs and strengthen compliance.

Get started! Book a demo or request a pilot to validate Omni at your site. Based in Caparica, Portugal. Global deployments available.

Name: Oase Health Solutions
Description:
Als innovatives Unternehmen sind wir spezialisiert auf die Entwicklung und Implementierung von KI- und RPA-Lösungen, insbesondere in der Langzeitpflege – im stationären als auch im ambulanten Bereich.

Ziel ist die Steigerung der Effizienz und Qualität im Pflege- und Gesundheitssektor durch die intelligente Anwendung von Technologien zur Automatisierung administrativer Prozesse. Angesichts des wachsenden Fachkräftemangels im Gesundheitswesen sehen wir unsere Mission darin, Lösungen zu entwickeln, um die Pflegeversorgung nachhaltig zu transformieren, ohne dass es zu massiven Qualitätseinbussen kommt.

Oase Health Solutions setzt an, wo administrative Anforderungen im Gesundheitswesen oft zeitaufwendig und fehleranfällig sind. Unsere KI- und RPA-Lösungen entlasten das Fachpersonal und stützt gleichzeitig eine gute Qualität der Versorgung. Sie sind darauf ausgerichtet, repetitive Aufgaben wie Dokumentation, Planung, Evaluation und Abrechnung zu automatisieren. Dadurch ermöglichen wir dem Pflegepersonal, sich verstärkt auf die direkte Betreuung und Pflege der Patienten zu konzentrieren.

Die essenzielle Bedeutung von KI und RPA, liegt für uns in der Schaffung eines echten Mehrwerts für das Gesundheitswesen in Zeiten des Fachkräftemangels. Durch den intelligenten Einsatz von smarter Technologie und Robotic Process Automation (RPA) werden nicht nur administrative Prozesse optimiert, sondern auch Daten analysiert, die treffend fundierte Entscheidungen ermöglichen, um die Effizienz und Qualität nachhaltig zu steigern.

Unsere RPA-Lösungen Bot Sidney und Bot Helsinki haben bereits in der Praxis erfolgreich Anwendung gefunden, und wir konnten durch die gewonnenen Erfahrungen mit der Oase Gruppe, einer führenden Pflegeeinrichtung ein Proof of Concept etablieren.

Why now? 
The enterprise Computer Vision market is booming at an unprecedented pace, faster than ever.

Emerging technologies will soon enable computers to perceive the world in unimaginable ways. 

SSL and all-in-one learning is rapidly becoming a real need. The market demands multiple use cases and capabilities within organizations.

Name: Nagaris
Description:
The Proposal is the Job.

Nagaris is the proposal platform that closes the gap between "I have a new client" and "my team is doing the work." For most firms, that gap is weeks. For Nagaris, that gap is minutes.

We believe the moment a client says "yes" should be the moment the work begins.

The Problem: In traditional firms, a signed proposal is just a PDF. After acceptance, you still have to manually set up the client, create jobs, assign staff, chase ID verification, and configure billing. It’s the "swivel chair" problem—jumping between tabs, re-entering data, and introducing errors.

The Solution: The "One Screen" Revolution. Nagaris creates a continuous, automated workflow. From one screen, you create every service for every entity in a complex group.

When your client clicks "Accept," the magic happens automatically...

* Jobs & Budgets Created: Work instantly appears in your team's queue with budgets locked.

* Multiplayer Onboarding: Your client completes ID verification, document uploads, and ATO/Xero linking on the spot.

* Payments Secured: Billing is captured immediately for the whole group.

* Government Verified Data: Nagaris eliminates the "Garbage In, Garbage Out" risk by connecting directly to government registries. Nagaris automatically rejects invalid TFN, ABN, and Director ID formats that other systems accept. Your database is accurate from Day One.

One screen to engage. Minutes to paid and work started.

Nagaris. The proposal is the job.

Name: Tipalo GmbH
Description:
INTRODUCTION
Tipalo GmbH is a Swiss LLC near Zurich, a fabless AI startup with own software to pioneer logic applications. Our specialty is the development of digital brains with an Artificial Nervous System similar to biological brains. Our AI technology is used for the fully autonomous control of "bodies", such as buildings, vehicles and robots. These "bodies" must be equipped with digital devices, that act as sensors, actuators and their own organs.

AI APPROACH
Our AI technology is self-learning by collecting information that is later converted into knowledge areas. The Tipalo approach to AI is very simple: we take biological intelligence as a template, means the living brain. It needs a different mindset to comprehend and represent parts of the real world and replicate the human mind. Our understanding of intelligence is based on logic, our AI concept contains objects reacting in time and space.

EDGE AI USE CASES
Tipalo brains are linked via a single interface to the corresponding body and perform intelligence for:
Level 1, as managers for smart building automation, e.g. indoor manufacturing, outdoor surveillance
Level 2, as pilots for autonomous vehicles of any kind, e.g. terrestrial, naval, aeronautics, space
Level 3. as robotic workers for outer space activities, e.g. in space stations, on extraterrestrial planets

AUTONOMY is the unique and defining feature of Tipalo AI technology
1. The body is the first decisive argument for autonomy, as it enables to do everything on its own. Cognitive AI requires a body hardware with sensors, actors and internal organs, like any living entity.
2. Next level of autonomy are spiking neural nets, using distinct groups enabling interactive algorithms. This implies that only some neurons are needed for a specific purpose, allowing explainable AI.
3. Next autonomy level is the software, as synapses between neurons, which implies no code.Synapses are used as universal format for any purpose and enable knowledge accumulation.

Description:
Multiconsulta se destaca como una innovadora empresa de software dedicada a la transformación y eficiencia en el mundo del retail. Nuestra especialización reside en potenciar el proceso de carga de créditos, particularmente en el ámbito de empresas minoristas que operan con diversas plataformas de bancos y financieras. Nuestra visión es simplificar y optimizar cada etapa del proceso de venta, desde la interacción inicial hasta la conclusión exitosa.
Uno de nuestros logros más notables es la creación de una plataforma única que integra múltiples bancos y financieras. Comprendemos los desafíos que enfrentan las empresas en la gestión de ofertas crediticias, a menudo dispersas en múltiples interfaces. Nuestra solución unificada agiliza este proceso al permitir a las empresas acceder y evaluar simultáneamente las ofertas de todas las entidades financieras asociadas. Esta consolidación elimina la complejidad y ahorra tiempo, lo que resulta en una gestión de créditos más precisa y eficiente.
Multiconsulta también ofrece servicios de agrupadores de datos, una herramienta esencial para la recopilación y análisis de información de clientes a través de plataformas web. Esto permite a las empresas tener una visión completa y estructurada de su base de clientes, facilitando la toma de decisiones fundamentadas y estratégicas. Al tener información en tiempo real a su alcance, las empresas pueden planificar estrategias de venta más efectivas y personalizadas.
En el mundo de las interacciones en línea, los sistemas de chatbot de Multiconsulta marcan la diferencia. Nuestros chatbots personalizados interactúan con los clientes, proporcionando respuestas instantáneas a preguntas y consultas. Más allá de brindar información, nuestros chatbots tienen la capacidad de tomar medidas concretas, como ofrecer resoluciones de ofertas crediticias y mostrar productos disponibles. Esta automatización inteligente mejora la experiencia del cliente y libera al equipo para enfocarse en las ventas.

Name: Custom Donations
Description:
We provide customizable, embeddable, mobile-friendly donation forms that integrate with your current website. We want you to accept online donations easily, securely, and with no up-front or monthly costs. We serve all non-profits, though we have a specialty in higher-education. 

You get unlimited, customizable forms that embed directly and seamlessly into your existing website. We remove the shortfalls of the other systems (primarily that it is hard to get new forms or to get a form that asks what you need it to ask) and give you what you need - an affordable, flexible way to securely accept online donations.

Our system is perfect for small non-profits -- no setup fees, no monthly credit-card fees, and very competitive rates.

Larger organizations with higher volume of online donations can replace our transactional service fees with one flat yearly payment. 

If you're an alumni organization with local chapters and clubs, our product has features you won't find anywhere else: An enterprise account allows both you and your clubs to accept online donations through our system. Share a common interface but keep the accounts (and the accounting) separate. Your local chapters and clubs use our service for free, can accept online donations or dues payments, and can also accept donations on your behalf. Your alumni get the benefit of making one transaction to pay their club dues as well as donate to you; you get the benefit of extra exposure on the local club website.

We kept our system clean and simple. So simple you can signup and start accepting donations through your existing website today.

Do you encounter technical limitations when it comes to making your products smarter and more connected? Name: TwinSpace
Description:
Das Leuchtturmprojekt "TwinSpace" soll die Scharnierfunktion digitaler Technologien zwischen ökonomischen und ökologischen Nutzen in die Breite tragen. 

Konkret soll dies erfolgen, indem (sicherheitsrelevante) Software für eingebettet Systeme hinsichtlich des Ressourcenbedarfs (z.B. CPU, GPU, Laufzeit) optimiert wird. Dazu wird ein automatisiertes Reverse Engineering von kompiliertem Code angestrebt. Dieser Code wird dann auf verschiedenen emulierten Hardware-(HW)-Plattformen simuliert und der Ressourcenbedarf gemessen. Sobald die passende HW-Plattform ausgewählt ist, wird der Code für die entsprechende HW-Plattform neu kompiliert. 

Durch das Reverse Engineering entsteht keine Cyber-Gefahr, da ausschließlich nichtfunktionale Aspekte übertragen werden. Traditionell wird die Ressourcenoptimierung bei Software (SW) ignoriert, da sich die Geschwindigkeit der HW ohnehin alle zwei Jahre verdoppelt. Mittels des entwickelten, erprobten und angewendeten Green-Coding Entwicklungswerkzeugs mit optimierten Ressourcen-Management – TwinSpace – soll die SW-Entwicklung im (sicherheitsrelevanten) Massengeschäft von eingebetteten Systemen revolutioniert werden. Dabei werden sowohl ökonomische Aspekte bspw. durch effizientere Entwicklungsprozesse als auch ökologische Aspekte durch erhöhte Energieeffizienz oder die Einsparung von CO2 durch kleinere Chipflächen optimiert. 

Das dieser Seite zugrundeliegende Vorhaben wurde mit Mitteln des Bundesministeriums für Wirtschaft und Klimaschutz unter dem Förderkennzeichen 01MN23013D gefördert. Die Verantwortung für den Inhalt der Veröffentlichung liegt bei den Autoren.

Description:

At Talem AI, we empower adjusters with cutting-edge technology. Using a single crash photo, our first-to-market Delta-V model analyzes impact severity and injury causation in near real-time. By enabling adjusters with reliable crash and injury data early in the claim lifecycle, Talem AI helps insurers:

- Enhance accuracy and consistency in segmentation, assignment, and reserving.
- Optimize early settlement activities, reducing claim duration and costs.
- Streamline claim workflows for faster and more efficient resolution.

With proven ROI—lower attorney representation rates, reduced claim severity, and fewer touchpoints—our technology empowers adjusters to focus on impactful decision-making and achieving better outcomes.

Name: Finding Fasteners Inc.
Description:
At fes.ai, we leverage decades of experience in creating mechanical joining solutions for industry leaders such as Caterpillar and Ford. Our founders have worked with virtually every vehicle type on the planet, from semi-trucks to backhoes, supplying engineered fasteners and automation solutions for a range of designs. 
During the recent global pandemic, we identified two major issues within our field. Firstly, many mechanical engineering programs neglect to teach about critical assembly elements like fasteners, glues, welds, and torqued joints – components used in everything from iPhones to tractors. This gap often leads to costly mistakes as engineers make decisions with limited guidance.
Secondly, engineers often struggle to utilize their PLM tools effectively to locate parts, resulting in unnecessary calls to vendors or distributors, contributing to substantial obsolescence costs. 
We've set out to address these problems head-on. Our innovative tool connects all parts in your system to the specific details of their use – who, when, and how. Further, it provides a digital expert to help designers navigate the parts list, preventing potential mistakes and duplication that could cost millions on every new project. Especially in this era of rapid EV program launches, our solution ensures efficiency and accuracy in design and assembly.

Name: Ideem
Description:
Ideem delivers Passkeys+, a next-generation authentication solution that combines the usability of consumer-grade FIDO2 passkeys with the strength of our patented Zero-Trust Security Module (ZSM). The result is a single, omni-channel platform for multi-factor authentication that’s purpose-built for highly regulated industries.

Developed with a top 5 global bank, ZSM is a FIPS 140-3 FIDO-compliant authenticator delivered entirely in software. It enables cryptographic device binding through a lightweight SDK that drops into any stack, working seamlessly across browsers and native apps. Passkeys handle user verification for passwordless login, while ZSM ensures passkeys remain bound to the device where they were created giving financial institutions the control and visibility they require.

Passkeys+ equips banks, payment wallets, cross-border platforms, payroll systems, and marketplaces with future-proof authentication in one simple package

Ideem’s drop-in SDK works seamlessly across all browsers and native apps. No user interaction is required - no effort, no permissions, no exceptions. Just easy and invisible device authentication.

Whether you're designing a 5kW rooftop system or a 50MW utility-scale installation, BAESS Labs gives you the intelligence, accuracy, and speed to deliver exceptional results every time.

We're working with forward-thinking professionals who know that the future of solar design is intelligent, automated, and accessible.

La Bussola delle 6C, un toolkit strategico che aiuta le organizzazioni a definire la propria strategia AI e a progettare soluzioni su misura;

Moduli AI componibili, che rigenerano i contenuti esistenti e permettono di creare nuove esperienze facilmente integrabili nei sistemi attuali;

Assistenti AI verticali, progettati per supportare i team interni e - a differenza delle AI generaliste - costruiti sul contesto unico di ciascuna organizzazione.

Ogni soluzione è personalizzabile, scalabile e progettata per evolvere nel tempo, grazie a un’architettura leggera, interoperabile e completamente human-in-the-loop.

Lavoriamo per un futuro in cui la conoscenza resti viva, accessibile e rilevante.

Name: Gv Consulting SRL
Description:
GV Consulting non è solo Industria 5.0.

Da anni accompagniamo le aziende metalmeccaniche italiane nel percorso di trasformazione digitale, partendo dai fondamenti dell’Industria 4.0 fino alle più recenti sfide dell’Industria 5.0.

Uno degli ambiti dove riscontriamo maggiore impatto è nella gestione dei processi produttivi, dove l'efficienza operativa e il controllo centralizzato fanno davvero la differenza. Per molte aziende, soprattutto nel comparto lamiera e metallo, adottare un gestionale ERP / MES non è più un'opzione, ma una necessità.

In GV Consulting aiutiamo le imprese a:
 ridurre gli sprechi;
 limitare gli errori umani;
 migliorare la tracciabilità;
 integrare produzione, logistica e contabilità;
 prepararsi al meglio a incentivi, perizie e investimenti 4.0/5.0.

Non ci rivolgiamo solo alle aziende già strutturate: anche le PMI che oggi usano gestionali “alla buona” possono trarre enorme valore da soluzioni pensate su misura, semplici da usare e realmente adattabili alle esigenze operative.

 Che tu debba semplicemente avere più controllo, o affrontare un vero cambio di marcia verso il digitale, abbiamo una soluzione per te.

L’approccio GV Consulting è verticale, concreto e basato sull’esperienza reale nel settore. Affianchiamo ogni cliente con un metodo collaudato: dall’analisi delle esigenze alla scelta della piattaforma gestionale più adatta, fino al supporto nell’attivazione dei benefici fiscali legati all’innovazione.

 Non si tratta solo di tecnologia, ma di competitività, crescita e sostenibilità dei processi.

Se vuoi davvero fare Industria 4.0 (e 5.0) sul serio, partiamo da ciò che ogni impresa deve saper governare: la propria produzione.

Adopshun 2.0 is being built as an AI-powered growth engine that helps organizations drive engagement, retention, and monetisation across products and channels with far less manual effort.

At its core, Adopshun 2.0 addresses one of the biggest challenges modern marketing and growth teams face: slow time-to-outcomes. Traditional tools focus on execution and campaign management, leaving teams dependent on static rules, segments, and constant optimisation. Adopshun 2.0 shifts this paradigm by learning from real customer behaviour and autonomously deciding what actions should be taken to maximise impact.

The platform is designed to work across industries, products, and use cases, adapting to real-time signals rather than assumptions. Instead of marketers manually configuring journeys, Adopshun 2.0 continuously experiments, personalises, and improves decisions across the entire customer lifecycle—whether the interaction happens inside an app, on the web, or across owned channels.

Building on Adopshun’s no-code foundation, Adopshun 2.0 enables teams to activate messages, experiences, and journeys while the AI engine determines when, where, for whom, and why each action should occur. This removes friction, reduces dependency on product and engineering teams, and dramatically accelerates execution.

Adopshun 2.0 gives brands a decisive speed and intelligence advantage. In a world overflowing with choices, sustained growth comes from timely, relevant, and meaningful interactions. Every customer touchpoint must feel contextual, intentional, and outcome-driven.

Adopshun enables autonomous growth by letting AI drive decisions, optimise outcomes, and free teams from manual tools.

Our multilevel, software-defined battery management system (BMS) controls every cell in real time and acts as the operating system of the battery. The integrated inverter and charger are built directly inside the battery pack – a layer of intelligence that works on any existing battery. 

Our systems extend battery life by up to 80%, improve safety, reduce weight, and enable fast charging and higher ranges across automotive, two-wheeler, off-road, and non-road applications.

By using AI and real-time data, we enable battery reuse through seamless software updates — paving the way toward a truly circular energy future.

Together with our partners (Handtmann, Munich Startup, Respond) and investors (e.g. Ananda, Bayern Kapital, Planet A, VsquaredVentures), we’re challenging the status quo and shaping the future of electric mobility and sustainable energy.

Pulsetrain is scaling from the heart of Europe with the vision to deliver world-leading, competitive mobility technologies and to help position Europe at the forefront of next-generation power electronics.

Follow us on our journey as we scale sustainable energy solutions that move the world forward.

Vivoka enables voice to work seamlessly alongside scanning, screens, and other interfaces, relying on a high-accuracy, fully offline voice execution environment that ensures fast, reliable task execution in real-world, noisy operational conditions.

Trusted worldwide, Vivoka supports global deployments across 65+ languages.

Why industry leaders choose Vivoka:

- Full control over workflows: Open APIs give IT and integration teams direct control over how voice executes tasks within business logic and operational flows.

- Lowest total cost of ownership: Hardware freedom and fully offline execution reduce long-term platform and operating costs at scale.

- Built for real-world operations: A high-accuracy, embedded voice execution environment designed for noisy and constrained environments.

- Works alongside existing technologies: Voice operates alongside scanning, screens, and existing systems through open APIs.

- Flexible technically and commercially: Platform and business model adapt to your needs.

Name: Truoco
Description:
In today's digital landscape, establishing trust is everything. But for too long, identity verification and compliance have been a black box—complex, costly, and a source of friction for legitimate customers. At Truoco, we're changing that.

We provide a single, intelligent platform that empowers businesses to stop fraud, slash verification costs, and seamlessly onboard more customers. We believe that compliance shouldn't be a barrier to growth; it should be an advantage.

Our philosophy is built on the truth of compliance: giving you the transparent tools and flexible control to build the exact verification workflow your business needs.

With Truoco, you can:

Eliminate Fraud: Our multi-layered security—combining digital intelligence, biometric liveness, and document verification—stops bad actors at the door.

Optimize Costs: Our adaptive, no-code workflow engine ensures you only pay for the checks you need, dramatically improving your ROI.

Deliver a Seamless Experience: Create a fast, intuitive, and frictionless onboarding journey that delights your customers and reduces drop-off.

Stop choosing between security and growth. With Truoco, you can have both.

•	Occupational/non-occupational incidents

•	Grievance and discipline management
•	HR case management
•	Union job bidding and collective bargaining agreement management
•	OHS medical
•	Preventative safety
•	FMLA case management
•	and more. 

Our award-winning platform enabled by AI is an SAP Endorsed App built on SAP Business Technology Platform and can seamlessly integrate with your system of choice allowing you to get up and running in four weeks or less.

Purpose built for highly regulated industries, consistent and standardized processes promote well-being and engagement – and ensure you’re always on the right side of compliance. Commsignia specializes in Connected Car / V2X hardware and software solutions to ADAS systems with a mission to increase traffic safety and efficiency on the road. Dedicated to the research and development of car connectivity systems for innovative car makers, the company aims to create the world’s first connectivity platform that integrates Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) and Vehicle-to-Infrastructure (V2I) with other car sensors and applications with everyday technologies from tablets and phones to smart homes.

The product line of Commsignia includes a V2X Communication Software Stack including Commsignia’s own security stack implementation, Hybrid V2X/ADAS Safety Applications, a V2X Simulator, On Board Units (OBU) and Roadside Units (RSU), all developed with flexibility, reliability and security in mind. The hardware- and platform-agnostic solutions compatible with multiple Real-Time Operating Systems (RTOS) make Commsignia the most dynamic and rapidly growing V2X provider on the market.

A nossa equipa multidisciplinar apresenta um conjunto diversificado de competências e vibra com o desafio de encontrar a solução tecnológica mais adequada a cada situação, o que em muitas circunstâncias significa desenvolvê-la de raiz.

É nesse momento que todo o nosso conhecimento e aptidões para compreender as caraterísticas únicas e o que realmente é importante numa empresa são colocados à prova e nos impelem a arquitetar o futuro.

Our mission is to facilitate the digital transformation process of OEMs (Original Equipment Manufacturer) and End Users: we work alongside them on the development and the adoption of hardware and software solutions aimed at optimizing equipment efficiency and improving their business.

Name: Alleantia
Description:
Alleantia is a Software Company globally recognized for its plug&play, reliable and complete Digital Industry solutions, from machine connectivity to machine performance analysis. 

Alleantia Core software connects any industrial machine, production plant, industrial device with applications and platforms, on-premise or on-cloud, through dozens of different API and certified connectors. It uses the powerful Library of Things, with over 5.000 machine drivers available. Through the free machine driver editor OEMs, system integrators, and end users can easily create new drivers for new machines. The availability of standardized and engineered machine data enables the creation of new value, new business models and new capabilities.

Alleantia Machine Insights are ready-to-use applications on top of Alleantia Core, that use its integration and data standardization capabilities to provide ready-to-use machine performance analysis, asset monitoring, energy usage monitoring and efficiency evaluation, and other features.  Including dashboards and diagrams to visualize information, consumption, production data and specific KPIs, with notification features.

Alleantia software stack, user-ready, covering from machine connection to machine insight, enables customers to measure performances and improve production and machines operations in days.

Description:

Name: SOAFEE
Description:
The Scalable Open Architecture for Embedded Edge (SOAFEE) initiative is an industry-led Special Interest Group (SIG) defined by automakers, semiconductor suppliers, open source and independent software vendors, and cloud technology leaders. The SOAFEE SIG intends to deliver a cloud-native architecture enhanced for mixed-criticality automotive applications with corresponding open-source reference implementations to enable commercial and non-commercial offerings.
The SOAFEE Governing Body is responsible for defining the strategic direction of the SOAFEE project. To achieve the project goals, the Governing Body will work with the Technical Steering Committee to create working groups and define the goals and objectives for these groups. The Governing Body will validate all output from the working groups to ensure that the strategic objectives of the project are met.

The Governing Body comprises a group of industry experts (Arm, Aumovio, AWS, Bosch, Cariad, GM, LG Electronics, Panasonic Automotive Systems, and Red Hat) to ensure that market intelligence is applied to the output of the SOAFEE project.

Emobot is a MedTech startup, which develops a medical device for the detection and continuous monitoring of mood disorders such as depression, propelled with AI. 

Using any camera connected to its artificial intelligence, Emobot translates facial expressions and voice into mood signals. https://www.emobot.fr/

Emobot is already deployed in several nursing homes, providing continuous data that helps doctors and caregivers manage behavioral and mood disorders.
Emobot is the first AI-based behavioral and emotional monitoring device for nursing homes, hospitals and the home. Each time Emobot triggers an alert, a psychiatrist is consulted to establish a diagnosis.

PR Contact : press@emobot.fr

VizioSense helps cities & companies optimizing their spaces and flows with ethical camera-based sensors and AI. 

We build monitoring & counting solutions that respect privacy-by-design. Our plug-and-play "sensor" embeds an edge-AI chip enabling on-device computer vision to count people or items. It sends only the counting information to the cloud. It has no capability to stream videos.

Products:
VizioPark: parking monitoring application
VizioCount: vehicle flow and pedestrian counting application

Other customised vision solutions you may need.

CodeXray combines multiple purpose-built systems with shared components — giving teams flexibility, depth, and end-to-end visibility without forcing an all-or-nothing approach.

What We Offer

3) API Security Observability, covering OWASP top 10, PII detection, collection and live API traffic assessment, CVSS based and custom risk scoring, passive and active testing. 

Our product are built for SaaS and On-Premise setups.  

Our Mission

To give engineering and security teams a unified understanding of their systems — enabling reliability, performance, and safety through intelligence, context, and simplicity.

Why CodeXray Exists

Observability tools tell you what happened.
Security tools tell you what might be risky.
What teams still lack is context and intelligence that connect the dots.

CodeXray bridges this gap by bringing observability, SRE reasoning, and API security together — without asking teams to adopt a single monolithic solution.

Recognition

Winner – Best Product in Agentic SRE & Full-Stack Observability Tools
CIO Conclave & Awards 2025 (UBS Forums)

Our Promise

To give every engineering and security team the clarity, intelligence, and confidence they need to run reliable, high-performing, and secure systems — with the flexibility of a modular, integrated approach rather than a one-size-fits-all platform.

Description:
RENrisk is a startup created to promote an innovative standard into RIR (Rischio Incidente Rilevante - Major Accident Hazard) establishments and in general where Real Time Risk Management and Resilience Engineering represent qualifying and determining aspects in management. 

The innovative RENrisk model represents the practical application of the most advanced innovations in the field of resilience engineering that are increasingly influencing risk engineering: from Safety I to Safety II.

The software solution behind the model is Intelligent Plant - IRIS (an acronym for Integrated Risk Indicator by Sapio), a software platform to locate and predict operating conditions that anticipate undesirable events and to optimize system performance. The platform includes reports and data analysis for production and maintenance performance and finds its completion in the management of risk as a "dynamic indicator", which is monitored in real time, as conditions change, and highlighting the acceptability of the same, suggesting, in case of deviations and anomalies compared to a condition considered "normal", the consequent actions to be taken to bring the plant to a state deemed acceptable.

Name: PreAct Technologies
Description:
PreAct Technologies delivers the world’s first software-definable flash LiDAR sensors. Affordable, compact and designed to function in a variety of use cases, PreAct’s sensors offer solutions in industries including automotive, trucking, robotics, healthcare, agriculture, smart cities and industrial applications. 

Currently the company develops and sells complete systems that are packaged as products addressing distinct markets. Each product consists of a flash LiDAR (3D camera), edge processing, and communications to an external platform such as a laptop or the company’s cloud service. A software development kit (SDK) is included that supports users to visualize the data in real time, store data, and work with it using either their own code or specialized tools provided by the company. One unique aspect of the SDK is that it includes an AI development platform that has been optimized for the sensor’s 3D output, thus enabling AI algorithms to be quickly developed with minimal training. The SDK can control the sensor directly and serves as the gateway to the company’s cloud service controlling software defined features and providing a data structure supporting AI training and data mining. 

Initially renowned for their work in the automotive industry, PreAct’s innovative technology was first inspired by their goal to save the millions of lives lost in automotive crashes each year. This mission-focus drove the development of the extraordinary speed and accuracy of PreAct’s near-field sensor systems. 

Founded in 2018, PreAct arose from more than 15 years of DARPA-funded research in high-speed optics and computing systems and a major investment from Artis Corporation, the leading US provider of active protection systems for the military. PreAct is led by seasoned experts with the engineering team composed of leaders in computer vision, optics, and parallel processing. The company is headquartered in Portland, Oregon, USA.

Name: Flosenso
Description:
EnergyBots, in its endeavor to craft sustainable energy solutions, proudly unveils FloSenso – the IoT-based automatic water tank level controller. In line with our commitment to intelligent solutions and eco-conscious practices, we designed FloSenso to effortlessly regulate water levels within tanks, marking a revolutionary chapter in water management.

Embedded with ultrasonic sensors, FloSenso delivers unparalleled accuracy in data collection, ensuring optimal functionality. Its remarkable ability to detect dry runs, characterized by the absence of water in storage or inline supply, safeguards your water pump from damage by promptly deactivating the pump. When water levels approach the minimum threshold, FloSenso springs into action, initiating automatic tank refilling – a process that eradicates the need for manual intervention. This orchestrated refill mechanism guarantees a constant water supply, even in your absence. Moreover, you can confidently set water system schedules, without worries, because the system prevents overflows by halting tank refilling when it reaches full capacity.

•	Wi-Fi enabled Smart Water Level Controller
•	Automatically Regulates Water Inflow
•	Stop Tank Overflows and Pump Dry Runs
•	Embedded with ultrasonic waterproof sensor
•	App-based tank monitoring and pump operations
•	Schedule timers for Water Pump Operations
•	Receive Push Notifications and Alerts on Smartphones

Embrace the ease of automated water management and forge an unprecedented connection with your water system. FloSenso empowers you with control, convenience, and conservation of water like never before.

Description:
Trusted to deliver fully outsourced circular models including buy-back, trade-in, repair, & resale. We handle the tech, the logistics, the ops and then deliver high-intent customers and enriched product data back to you.

***

- You've got a drill in your shed, your garage, your loft.
- You don't (can't/shouldn't) use it.
- You don't want to throw it away. (we don't want you to either!)
- You can't be bothered to sell it peer-to-peer (and we don't blame you!)

- Another DIY retailer doesn't.

At Returnal, we turn one-time buyers into lifelong customers.
If you work in CRM, Loyalty, Marketing or Sustainability and you know which one of these brands you want to be then get in touch and we'll happily share what we've learned from 20+yrs in secondary markets to help you build your business case.

The results for our partners:

Customer acquisition cost drops dramatically (often >80%)
Customer lifetime value soars
Average ROI: 22.5×

***

Most brands lose money the moment a product leaves the shelf.

A £100 drill is sold, used for 6 months, then resold on eBay for £40. The customer walks away. The brand spends £80+ to acquire the next one. CAC rises. Loyalty never begins.

We change that:

With Returnal’s fully serviced trade-in programmes, that same customer brings the drill back to you in under 60 seconds and receives guaranteed credit. They spend more (£150+) on their next purchase, stay in your ecosystem, and become walking proof of your brand’s value.

We recover value from used products, (not just tools but small appliances, furniture & fashion too), power genuine circularity, and transform casual customers into authentic advocates — all while delivering big data from what used to be blindspots and unheard customer stories.

Servicios y Productos

	2.	ShadowDragon: Proporciona capacidades avanzadas de inteligencia de fuente abierta (OSINT), recolectando y analizando datos de diversas fuentes en línea para detectar y monitorear actividades criminales y fraudes en línea.

Name: SIListra Systems
Description:
The solutions from SIListra Systems enable the execution of safety-critical applications on standard (COTS) hardware. For this purpose, SIListra offers the TUV SUD certified software development tool, SIListra Safety Transformer. The core function of the SIListra Safety Transformer is the automatic generation of diagnostic code to detect random hardware faults. This allows users to comply with safety standards such as IEC 61508 (up to SIL3), ISO 26262 (up to ASIL D), IEC 62061 (up to SIL3), IEC 13849 (up to PLe) and EN 50716 (up to SIL4) with standard hardware.

Safety functions in the fields of industrial automation, control systems, and robotics can be implemented more scalable, flexible, cost-efficient, and sustainably portable compared to established hardware solutions.

Manufacturers of plant, robot, device, and machine controllers consolidate their hardware infrastructure with this new generic, proven-in-practice approach. Safety-critical control applications run on the same hardware as non-safety-critical applications, regardless of whether it is an embedded system, a standard PLC with C/C++ support, an industrial PC, an edge server, or an IT server.

Name: Infinity - Embedded Tools
Description:
Infinity – Embedded Tools is an embedded software company specializing in advanced profiling solutions for firmware developers. Focused on non-intrusive, portable tools that enable runtime analysis, memory optimization, and real-time debugging across diverse platforms.

1. Designed and developed Infinity Runtime Performance Profiling Tool, a zero-intrusive solution measuring CPU load per task/function via hardware-accelerated DWT/ITM sampling (configurable 128-16K cycles). Enables real-time data collection without system disruption, automated source mapping, and interactive HTML reports for drill-down analysis—ideal for RTOS task optimization and CI/CD validation.
2. Designed and developed Infinity Runtime Stack & Heap Analysis Tool, a standalone, portable runtime analyzer for embedded systems performing stack and heap analysis. Integrated seamless support for OpenOCD, cross-toolchains (e.g., ARM non-EABI, STM32F4x), and CLI automation, with memory profiling visualizations to simplify stack/heap boundary configuration. Detects overflows, fragmentation, and peak usage via pattern-fill overwrites (e.g., 0xAA baseline), generating visual maps and reports.
3. Designed and developed Infinity Comprehensive Memory Profiling Product, supporting 18 cross-toolchains for advanced analysis, optimization, and real-time debugging in embedded systems. Enables static and runtime insights across ARM, Renesas, Xtensa, RISC-V, PowerPC, and AArch64 environments.

Name: SmartBIIM
Description:
A SmartBIIM é uma ferramenta de gestão de obras que tem por objetivo fazer o cruzamento entre as informações do planejamento e o canteiro de obras utilizando BIM (Building Information Modeling) e BI (Business Intelligence). 

A ferramenta atua em duas fases distintas de cada projeto. A primeira fase é de “Pré-Construção, ou seja, etapa que antecede o início das obras. Durante essa etapa podemos inserir informações de orçamento, planejamento, plano de ataque e modelos BIM.

A segunda fase é a de “Construção”, ou seja, etapa de execução da obra. Durante essa etapa podemos inserir informações de medição através do sistema web ou do aplicativo mobile e depois visualizar as informações através de dashbords interativos que podem ser personalizados conforme a necessidade da obra.

Name: Answir - AI for IR
Description:
Answir automates investor interactions, providing instant, accurate answers while freeing up valuable time for executives and IR personnel.

Investor Relations Officers (IROs) spend too much time answering repetitive investor questions—often from information already available in public filings, reports, and press releases. Meanwhile, investors struggle to find key details buried in lengthy PDFs and databases like SEDAR and EDGAR. The result? Delays, inefficiencies, and missed opportunities for meaningful engagement.

Answir was created to solve this problem with AI. By instantly answering investor queries using publicly available data, Answir acts as a 24/7 intelligent assistant, streamlining communication and freeing up IROs for higher-value work. Companies save time, investors get instant answers, and organizations can focus on what truly drives shareholder value.

Name: Inertia Technology B.V.
Description:
Inertia is specialized in the development of miniaturized wireless inertial measurement units (IMUs) that can sense, process and communicate motion, vibration and orientation features of interest. 


Inertia has three lines of products:
- Motion capturing, with our new-generation waterproof and dustproof wireless Inertial  Measurement Unit (IMU), the ProMove-V. Using Inertia’s high-speed and low-power wireless  technology, a network of tens of ProMove-V’s can sample and stream all sensor data at high data rates with precise synchronization across all devices. https://inertia-technology.com/product/motion-capture-promove-v/

- The Equine Gait Analysis, with the Equi-Pro product. Equi-Pro comes to support equine veterinarians and researchers in evaluating lameness and gait performance in an objective way. https://inertia-technology.com/product/equi-pro/

- The Vibration Monitoring, with the NexoDAQ wireless data acquisition platform. NexoDAQ interfaces with various analogue and digital sensors, from MEMS to IEPE accelerometers or generic voltage sensors. https://inertia-technology.com/product/vibration-monitoring-vmon-4000/

The Inertia wireless protocol is the fastest and best synchronized wireless low-power interface of IMUs on the market. The collision-free MAC protocol is centrally controlled by the Inertia Gateway. Up to 39 ProMove-V sensor nodes sampling on 14 channels (3D acceleration, 3D high-g acceleration, 3D gyroscope, 3D compass, barometer and temperature) up to 200 Hz per channel send their data in a real-time, synchronized manner to the Inertia Gateway for visualization, logging and post-processing.

Synchronization is a key factor for achieving simultaneous sampling of different measurement points in a wireless network. Our network-wide synchronization has a groundbreaking accuracy of less than 100 ns. That means that all sensor nodes sample at the same time instance across the network.

            - Delay CapEx for up to 10 Years.
