Looking ahead, we’re excited to launch our IoT platform, Illustrious Hub, in early 2025. This platform is designed to make data easier to understand and act on. It’s a web-based tool that lets users build custom dashboards, connecting their devices to interactive widgets like charts, gauges, and detailed reports. With Illustrious Hub, businesses can visualize real-time data, make informed decisions, and improve efficiency.

We’re also well-versed in web development, with deep experience in PHP platforms such as Laravel, Joomla, and WordPress, as well as JavaScript frameworks like React, Vue, and Node.js. These tools help us build cutting-edge solutions that work smoothly across modern web browsers.

In short, whether it’s creating robust embedded systems, developing web applications, or launching IoT solutions, we’re committed to bringing the latest in engineering innovation to life.

Name: A Lab-On-A-Chip
Description:
Mission: Build DNA-based living chip production.

A lab-on-a-chip (LOC) is a device that integrates one or several laboratory functions on a single integrated circuit (commonly called a "chip") of only millimeters to a few square centimeters to achieve automation and high-throughput screening.[1] LOCs can handle extremely small fluid volumes down to less than pico-liters. Lab-on-a-chip devices are a subset of microelectromechanical systems (MEMS) devices and sometimes called "micro total analysis systems" (µTAS). LOCs may use microfluidics, the physics, manipulation and study of minute amounts of fluids. However, strictly regarded "lab-on-a-chip" indicates generally the scaling of single or multiple lab processes down to chip-format, whereas "µTAS" is dedicated to the integration of the total sequence of lab processes to perform chemical analysis. The term "lab-on-a-chip" was introduced when it turned out that µTAS technologies were applicable for more than only analysis purposes

The Lab-On-A-Chip is a subsidiary of Khamsa Group of Businesses (KGB).

Name: VisionFI
Description:
Generic AI speaks internet. Scout speaks banking.

VisionFI is an AI company. We build Scout, the Industry Language Model (ILM) for financial services.

Large Language Models are trained on the entire internet—they know a little about everything and a lot about nothing specific. When your documents say “checking,” “DDA,” or “demand deposit account,” generic AI sees three different things. Scout understands they’re identical.

Scout ILM was purpose-built for financial services. It knows Reg Z from Reg E. It recognizes that ten different attorneys can write the same covenant ten different ways—and catches all of them. This isn’t AI with banking features bolted on. This is AI that thinks in banking.

**What We Do**

Scout ILM applies deep banking intelligence to documents and images—PDFs, scans, mobile photos—to interrogate content, validate expectations, and trigger intelligent actions. Delivered as a cloud-based API, Scout plugs natively into the systems banks and credit unions already use: LOS, DAO, CRM, Core, Compliance Platforms, and more.

**Why It Matters**

Financial documents express identical legal concepts in dozens of different ways. Generic AI pattern-matches on keywords and misses most of what matters. Scout understands meaning—regardless of phrasing.

**Who We Serve**

We power document intelligence for banks, credit unions, and the platforms that serve them. Our partners embed Scout into their solutions to deliver intelligence that understands banking natively.

The intelligence layer for financial documents.

Name: Telmtron Ltd.
Description:
Telmtron is a product-focused Embedded Software Consultancy, working with product visionaries to help bring their ideas to life.

Typical clients are start-ups and scale-ups in the early stages of product development. You might have an idea for a product and need advice on processors to use or operating system you need (if any!), be close to spinning the first prototype of a PCB and need software to prove functionality, or you have existing hardware and/or software that you need to get to the next step on your road to production. You might even have software that needs porting to a new processor because of recent global supply chain disruptions.

Your product could be anything from a single microcontroller, to a large-scale system of systems. I can target embedded Linux, RTOS, bare metal, hypervisors or even create bespoke multitasking schedulers tailored to your requirements.

When you’re ready to send your product out into the world, I can help with desktop applications for production or field service to test, load and update your firmware.

My work draws on a wealth of experience writing software and deployment tools for connected and distributed Embedded Systems of various sizes, including:

High-reliability / mission-critical systems
Telematics
Product demonstrators / technical marketing
Distributed embedded systems
Smart learning tools
Smart home / IoT
Bootloaders and production tools
If you think you have a project I can help with, please get in touch.

– Chris Barlow, Director and Embedded Systems Specialist, Telmtron Ltd.

Name: VerifiableLetter Inc.
Description:
Scammers often use genuine business name to commit fraud. It's a rapidly growing problem. Visit Canada Anti-fraud Center for more.

VerifiableLetter tackles the challenge with a robust verification mechanism for all printed and digital communications:

Unique Verification Codes: Each letter generated through VerifiableLetter has a unique verification code. This code is embedded in the document, allowing recipients to verify its authenticity easily.
Self-Verify Portal: Recipients can visit the VerifiableLetter portal and enter the verification code provided in the letter. The portal confirms whether the letter is genuine and requests relevant details to cross-check.
Tamper-Proof Technology: VerifiableLetter ensures that all letters are verifiable and any unauthorized changes to the document are easily detectable. This prevents alterations and ensures the integrity of the communication.
Real-Time Notifications: Companies receive real-time notifications whenever a verification is performed or if any alteration is reported. This provides an additional layer of security and oversight, helping track the dissemination and verification of sensitive communications.

Benefits of VerifiableLetter
Implementing VerifiableLetter offers several significant advantages:

Enhanced Security: By making all letters verifiable, companies can protect their letterhead from misuse, preventing fraud and safeguarding their reputation.
Increased Trust: Customers, partners, and stakeholders can confidently trust the authenticity of communications, knowing they can easily verify the legitimacy of any letter they receive.
Operational Efficiency: The streamlined verification process reduces the need for manual checks and follow-ups, saving time and resources for both the sender and the recipient.
Compliance and Accountability: VerifiableLetter provides an audit trail for all communications, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements and enhancing accountability in corporate correspondence.

Energy efficiency, operational sustainability and mission-critical resilience all depend on an operator’s ability to see and control a complex and ever-changing thermal environment. We give data center operators full control of the entire environment with our AI-powered ECOaaS solution.  ECOaaS sits between IT systems and data center infrastructure to truly read the room, enabling an IT-aware infrastructure as well as an infrastructure-aware operation. 
 
With ECOaaS from TycheTools Partners, what was once a manual and cumbersome management process can now be automated.
 
About Us
TycheTools Partners and its solutions were born out of the university system and more than 15 years of university-industry collaborative research in Europe, pressing the notion that there’s a better way to monitor, manage and predict the needs of the data center environment. ECOaaS is the product of that thinking. 
 
TycheTools Partners develops and implements AI-driven, predictive analytics solutions enabling data centers to operate more efficiently, meet increasingly complex sustainability regulations and prevent infrastructure failure. Manufactured in the US, the TycheTools Partners products represent the only purpose-built solution designed specifically for the challenges of mission-critical data management, providing the means to monitor, report and predict issues at the source. Based in Virginia, TycheTools Partners provides businesses and enterprise data centers a level of data and actionable intelligence previously unavailable in data center operations – eliminating the guesswork of resource management for good.

Name: Logikos Overview
Description:
Logikos Overview is a tracking management system that helps eliminate equipment loss, creating efficiency in time and money. We go beyond just inventory management, by providing real-time mobile tracking services and an online portal that make your job easier. 

Here’s how it works: You install our tracking hub into your vehicles or warehouses and put the tags on your assets. The tags you will attach to your assets are water-resistant, hot and cold resistant, and abrasion and shock-resistant. They are also designed to have a long battery life to last as long as your equipment does. The trackers you’ll install in your vehicles are built to last and are powered whenever your vehicles are running, you can also have them plugged into a power outlet at your warehouse or office.  

Each tag periodically pings its location using active RFID, which can be heard by a tracker even from hundreds of feet away (*range may vary by environment). Each tracker then communicates GPS and location data over the cellular network to Overview servers. Even if you have thousands of tags our servers help organize the data, allowing you to easily see the when and where of all your vehicles and assets through our online portal.  

The primary cause of asset and equipment loss is through human error, no longer do you need to worry about equipment being left behind or misplaced due to poor reporting, you will know exactly where that asset is in your warehouse, or which job site it was left at.

Description:
Uzashop a point of sale (POS) system for businesses in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC). The system can be used to track sales, manage inventory, and generate reports. It also offers features such as accounting, customer management, and SMS alerts.

Uzashop is a cloud-based system, which means that it can be accessed from anywhere with an internet connection. This makes it ideal for businesses that have multiple locations or that operate remotely.

The system is easy to use and can be customized to meet the needs of any business. It is also affordable, making it a cost-effective option for businesses of all sizes.

Here are some of the features of Uzashop.co:

Sales tracking: Uzashop track sales data, including sales totals, products sold, and customer information. This data can be used to generate reports and make informed business decisions.

Inventory management: Uzashop help businesses track inventory levels, set reorder points, and manage orders. This helps to ensure that businesses have the products they need on hand to meet customer demand.

Accounting: Uzashop, based on OHADA, help businesses track their finances, including income, expenses, and taxes. This information can be used to generate financial reports and make sure that businesses are in compliance with tax laws.

Customer management: Uzashop help businesses track customer information, including contact information, purchase history, and preferences. This information can be used to provide better customer service and target marketing campaigns.

SMS alerts: Uzashop send SMS alerts to customers about new products, sales, and other important information. This helps to keep customers informed and engaged.

Name: TryKeyProtocol
Description:
Trykey uses sensors and blockchain technology to help investors track their physical infrastructure, such as auto-rickshaws, farm equipment, delivery bikes, and hotels. For example, investors in auto-rickshaws can ensure drivers aren't joyriding or underreporting earnings. GPS sensors track locations, while seat sensors count passengers. These metrics calculate the expected yield.

Trykey also includes anti-tampering systems to prevent disconnection. Machines won't start until the expected amount is paid. Payments are made by scanning a QR code, directing employees to our payment gateway. Payments are made in local currency, converted to crypto on the Solana chain, and saved in a decentralized wallet.

Trykey takes a small commission, and investors can withdraw funds anytime in crypto or local currency.

Name: SIGP - Sistema Integrado de Gestão de Propriedades
Description:
O SIGP é uma aplicação multiplataforma de gestão agrícola, disponibilizada via internet, acessível através do endereço: http://www.sigp.pt. Baseado em tecnologias SIG permite, em tempo real, a implementação de processos inovadores de controlo, produção e gestão. O planeamento das atividades agrícolas, a otimização de custos, a rastreabilidade de todos os processos são aspetos que permitem atingir o principal objetivo: assegurar a qualidade dos produtos comercializados. É composto por vários módulos, interligados entre si, que respondem às necessidades dos vários atores agrícolas. Os módulos que atualmente compõem o SIGP são:
Módulo Práticas Culturais: Solução para gestão das atividades realizadas nas explorações agrícolas ao longo do ano, permitindo alocação de RH's, Equipamentos, Subcontratação, Produtos (fitofármacos, adubos e outros consumíveis) com gestão de stock
Módulo Gestão de Plantas: Solução para gestão de vinhas velhas de excelência de entidades. Permite gestão planta a planta das vinhas
Módulo Monitorização: Solução que permite a inventariação das explorações dos associados e registo de todo o acompanhamento técnico prestado aos agricultores ao longo do ano, por parte de cooperativas/associações
Módulo Caderno de Campo:  Solução para gestão de cadernos de campo de vários agricultores por entidade
Módulo Lagar: Gestão de todo o processo, desde a entrada da azeitona até à saída de azeite para comercialização, com garantia de rastreabilidade durante todo o processo
Módulo Adega:  Gestão de todo o processo, desde a entrada da uva até à saída de vinho para comercialização, com garantia de rastreabilidade durante todo o processo
Módulo Meteorologia: Solução com disponibilização de previsões meteorológicas por local
Módulo Sensor: Possibilidade de integração de sensores e estações meteorologias
Módulo EYESonTRAPS: Solução para monitorização de pragas na vinha, através das armadilhas tradicionais.

Name: PredicTech
Description:
At PredicTech, we've had it up to here with the unjust race in productivity that leaves manufacturing SMEs in the dust. Our PredicTech tribe, a squad of elite engineers and experts, will rally around you. We'll custom-build solutions that will leave the most profound impact on your business. Our platform is smart, it thinks for you – crunches the numbers, spots trends, and hands you actionable insights on a silver platter. It’s like having a personal trainer for your machinery, coaxing it to perform better, run faster, and live longer.

We’re not just talking big – we’re walking the talk. Our solution is already in action, adopted by numerous Sheffield manufacturers, enabling them to squeeze every bit of life out of their legacy machines. We're passionate about SMEs not just surviving, but thriving, flexing muscles they didn't know they had.

You see, we don't just want to level the playing field; we want to tilt it in your favour. We're in the business of making David look like Goliath, of flipping the script so the underdog has the last laugh. With us on your team, you can revolutionize your operations and leave the competition chomping on your dust.

Here at PredicTech, we are not just a service; we're a revolution. And we invite you to be a part of it.

Nosso sistema de controle de acessos (PointiD) integrado a hardwares de última geração e ao nosso sistema de gestão condominial, garante a segurança do condomínio e uma melhor gestão de processos cotidianos. 

Estamos sempre em busca de novas maneiras de aprimorar a gestão e a eficiência das empresas, permanecendo na vanguarda das tendências tecnológicas.

adoptIQ was created by builders who grew tired of AI tools that sounded the same.

Elle repose sur un équilibre entre l’acquisition de données visuelles sur site en amont - en profitant notamment de vues aériennes “tactiques” du haut d’une grue par exemple -, le transfert haut débit de ces informations à haut contenu sur une plateforme cloud sécurisée, et le traitement de ces données en aval, telle que la chrono-analyse. 

La croissance de Topdeck passe par une compréhension profonde des besoins des maîtres d'œuvre quant à l'exécution de leur chantier, avec un accent sur l’optimisation d'activités cycliques ou répétitives telles qu’on les observe en construction verticale notamment.

El documento presenta KananFleet, una tecnología de administración y gestión de flotillas vehiculares y activos en general, ofrecida por LA NOEL, E.I.R.L. Incluye una versión web y una aplicación móvil (KananFleet MOBILE).

Puntos clave:
¿Qué es KananFleet? Es una tecnología que ayuda a la administración de flotas vehiculares (terrestres o marítimas), maquinaria pesada y equipo en general. Cuenta con una versión certificada para SAPB1 SQL/HANA. KananFleet MOBILE permite a operadores y supervisores controlar recargas de combustible, incidencias, viajes, órdenes de servicio y horas de productividad.
Problemas que resuelve: Ayuda a las empresas a gestionar la rentabilidad de su flota, controlando costos de combustible, mantenimiento y llantas. Permite conocer la disponibilidad de unidades, las que están fuera de servicio y el costo de operación por unidad/viaje.
Funcionalidad general: Se divide en cuatro áreas:
Dirección (KPI's): Indicadores de costos por mantenimiento, causa raíz, tipo de servicio, eficiencia, disponibilidad, rentabilidad y eficiencia presupuestal.
Operación: Estatus e historial de activos, gestión de mantenimientos, órdenes de servicio, talleres, mecánicos, herramientas, refacciones, control de costos, asignación de neumáticos y baterías, entregas/recepciones con checklist digital, control de recargas de combustible, reporte de incidencias, creación y liquidación de viajes, generación de Carta Porte.
Administración: Manejo de empresas y sucursales, administración de usuarios y permisos, inventario de activos, gestoría de operadores/choferes, configuración de criterios de mantenimientos, parámetros para neumáticos y baterías, viajes, liquidaciones y rendimientos de combustible.
Movilidad (KananFleet MOBILE): Registro de recargas de combustible, incidencias de vehículos/activos/llantas (con fotografía y GPS), solicitud y consulta de órdenes de servicio, consulta y actualización de estatus de viajes, registro de gastos de viaje y consulta de reportes.

Het systeem wordt uiteraard voorzien van uw eigen naam, Logo, kleuren en eventueel product foto’s. GenesiX redefine a forma de criar produtos digitais com IA.


 Nascemos com um propósito audacioso:


Democratizar a criação de produtos digitais, permitindo que qualquer pessoa, (de empreendedores digitais individuais a grandes empresas) possa estruturar, validar e desenvolver ideias de forma inteligente, automatizada e produzindo da mesma forma que as grandes equipes de produto.


Enquanto outras plataformas focam apenas em geração de ideias ou automação de tarefas ou vibe coding, vamos muito além. 


Integramos metodologias profissionais de Product Management (Discovery → Delivery) com agentes de IA especializados, que guiam o usuário passo a passo na construção completa de um produto, da ideação ao lançamento do protótipo.


13 etapas:

Ideação, contexto e problema

Análise de mercado, tendências de mercado, marketfit

Benchmarks

Matrizes SWOT e CSD

Personas

Pesquisa com usuários

Validação de hipóteses

User stories e user flow

Features e priorizações

Critérios e métricas

Roadmap e backlog

Product Requirement Document (PRD) e lançamento do MVP


 Como superamos as demais plataformas?

Combinando tecnologia de ponta e pensamento estratégico!


 Sistema construído sobre um stack moderno e robusto, que inclui TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Node.js, Next.js, React, FastAPI, Express.js, LangChain, Prisma ORM, além de integrações com OpenAI, Anthropic, Perplexity e Grok.


 O backend utiliza PostgreSQL, MongoDB e Redis, enquanto a infraestrutura roda em Docker, AWS, Supabase, Railway e Vercel, garantindo performance, segurança e escalabilidade.


 O resultado?

Uma plataforma AIaaS capaz de transformar horas de trabalho em minutos, ajudando pessoas e empresas a criarem e gerir ideias.


GenesiX é mais do que uma ferramenta.

É um ecossistema que une tecnologia, design e gestão de produto em um só lugar, o copiloto ideal para quem quer criar, testar, validar e lançar o próximo grande produto digital.


 O futuro é Genesix

At Persystems, we make advanced simulation techniques accessible across engineering disciplines. Our solutions automatically handle complex physical modeling, enabling stable and efficient simulations. By advancing these innovations, we empower engineers to push boundaries confidently.

ELMA:
Our flagship electrical drivetrain simulation offers the fastest real-time factor of 0.5, speeding up development and decision-making and giving you a competitive edge.

SENSOR FUSION:
Our sensor fusion, designed for exceptional stability and efficiency, integrates data from multiple sensors, providing precise outputs in demanding environments.

OPTIMAL CONTROL:
Our optimal control system calculates precise trajectories and uses motion primitives to implement controls on resource-limited microcontrollers, enhancing efficiency and safety. It is ideal for off-highway vehicles, robotics, and more.

INVERTER:
For peak performance, we developed our 60V inverter family (7kW to 25kW). The high PWM frequency, optimized through simulation, reduces power consumption by 5%, making it ideal for low-inductance machines.

Each product reflects the power of our core simulation technology. At Persystems, we deliver innovative solutions that meet the highest standards, helping you achieve your goals more efficiently and push the boundaries of what’s possible.

Con l’avvento del 2000 Incifra incrementa il proprio core business: sviluppa nuove tecnologie sempre più all’avanguardia per la gestione e l’accoglienza, adatte a tutte le realtà operanti in settori caratterizzati da un ampio flusso di utenza quotidiano.

Il 2013 rappresenta il crocevia: Incifra cambia sede e amplia la propria struttura e il proprio organico. 
Nasce il reparto di sviluppo, in grado non solo di offrire soluzioni reali, scalabili e di grande valore, ma anche di apportare un'esperienza costruttiva e sicura per creare prodotti innovativi e performanti.

Oggi, grazie al proprio passato, Incifra è leader nella produzione di sistemi di gestione delle attese ed è il partner ideale per qualunque realtà aziendale, di piccole o grandi dimensioni.

Renforcer la capacité des étudiants à concevoir et à développer des robots et des produits innovants.

Promouvoir et dynamiser la valeur de la force fondamentale que représentent les jeunes innovateurs et designers de produits.
Renforcer les compétences des jeunes dans leur rôle de leaders, en mettant l'accent sur le leadership dans le domaine de la robotique et de la conception de produits.
Les membres du Club travaillent ensemble pour créer un environnement propice à l'apprentissage, à l'innovation et à la collaboration, favorisant ainsi le développement de compétences professionnelles et la préparation des étudiants pour leur future carrière dans le domaine de la robotique et de la conception de produits.

Name: Evolved Embedded
Description:
Hi. We help teams build better embedded systems software by training, consultancy, code review, and most of all by hands-on development.

We work in modern C++ primarily on ARM Cortex‑M devices - any family - for RTOS or bare metal development. Embedded GNU/Linux development for ARM Cortex‑A is also in our happy zone. We can do any kind of C++ application development for Linux on x86/x86_64 architectures.

Our approach is firmly rooted in lean, micro-incremental development using TDD, clean design, continuous integration and continuous test - Extreme Programming approaches that people find hard to get right for embedded systems. We can help you to get them right, too.

We're adept at PCB design, and we design and build hardware for developers as practice platforms to work on their TDD and design skills. We assemble custom test rigs for verification and diagnostics that let us capture detailed telemetry and streaming real-time instruction trace.

Hit the "+Follow" button on this page to stay up to date with news and blog posts, and head on over to the website to get a more complete view of ways we can help you out.

Name: Onpilot AI
Description:
OnPilot’s mission is to help CRM and SaaS companies make their products truly intelligent - by giving every customer an easy-to-use, built-in AI copilot.
Our platform lets vendors launch their own branded copilots inside their dashboards, helping end users update records, write follow-ups, and make decisions faster. These copilots integrate with the tools teams already use, eliminating app-switching and manual busywork.

For CRMs, this means higher engagement, retention, and data quality; for users, it means simpler, time-saving workflows.

We also focus on industries where AI adoption must be safe and compliant - finance, healthcare, and enterprise SaaS.

Why we are the game changer:

OnPilot copilots are designed to be intelligent, effortless, and secure — ready to use in minutes, without setup friction. They understand context across messages, tasks, and records, helping teams act faster and smarter within the tools they already trust.

Key advantages:

• Easy to deploy: No heavy integrations or AI prompt tuning — copilots can be added with just a few lines of config.
• Fully connected: Syncs with CRM, email, chat, calendars, and files to deliver cross-tool insights.
• Brand-first: Each copilot runs under your product’s identity and color scheme - not ours.
• Extensible: Plug in APIs, data connectors, or private models with SDKs and no-code templates.
• Context-aware: Learns from conversations, fields, and recent activity to generate relevant actions.
• Scalable & compliant: Multi-tenant architecture with isolation, auditability, and usage tracking.
• Data stays yours: Built with zero data sharing and per-tenant control over model, storage, and policies.

Vision - Where We’re Going

We believe the next wave of SaaS will be AI-native by default — every product will come with a copilot built in.

Vous maitrisez ainsi l’usure de vos  équipements, mais aussi la maintenance  préventive de votre chaufferie, et rationalisez de vos coûts.
VIGILIA est le portail de l'avenir de la chaufferie.

Name: Redkill Technologies
Description:
Hardware autonomy without software control is a facade. 

In high-stakes sectors like defense, nuclear energy, and industrial automation, relying on "Black Box" operating systems is a strategic liability. 

If you cannot audit or verify the code running your mission, you do not truly own it. 

Redkill Technologies is closing this gap by building a Formally Verified, Safety-Critical RTOS from first principles—engineered in India for the world. Unlike legacy Linux wrappers, we build the kernel from scratch to ensure mathematical certainty, total transparency, and absolute control. 

Led by a team of kernel engineers from Google, AMD, and Qualcomm, we provide the high-assurance software stack that modern critical infrastructure demands globally. 

The hardware is ready; we are building the brain.

5. *Shipping Solutions:* We’re connected with FedEx for streamlined shipping, ensuring your products get to where they need to be efficiently.

6. *Unparalleled Security:* Built on blockchain technology, TTBMath offers the highest level of security for your sensitive data.

*Why TTBMath?*
We simplify the complex, automate the mundane, and protect your business—all while helping you grow. Whether you're a distillery, winery, or brewery, TTBMath is designed to meet your needs and free up your time so you can focus on what you do best: creating exceptional products.

Join the growing number of industry leaders who trust TTBMath to handle their operations, compliance, and growth. Your peace of mind is just a click away.

Our team has been collaborating for over five years, gathering experience in embedded security and safety-related projects, honed in collaborative efforts with industry partners.

We firmly believe in the potential of open-source software to disrupt security and safety-critical industries, given its power to drive innovation faster through community cooperation, by building a common open-core upon which enterprise ecosystems can flourish. Thus, our mission is to foster the development of industry-grade open software components that can be easily certified and widely deployed in IoT networks and critical infrastructure.

Name: Argos System
Description:
At Argos Systems, we specialize in embedded software engineering, hardware development, and system-level testing and validation. With over a decade of experience, we deliver innovative and high-quality solutions for the automotive, industrial, consumer electronics, and healthcare sectors.

We work closely with industry leaders such as Qualcomm, Thundercomm, TI, NXP, Rockchip, and Allwinner, providing expertise across the entire embedded stack, from firmware and device drivers to middleware and custom HMI development. Our team is skilled in real-time systems, board bring-up, BSP development, and communication protocols.

In healthcare, we develop embedded solutions for medical imaging, patient monitoring devices, wearable health trackers, and connected IoMT (Internet of Medical Things) platforms. Our focus is on safety, compliance, and reliability, ensuring that our partners can accelerate innovation while meeting stringent regulatory standards.

Beyond development, we offer comprehensive testing and validation services, including automated HIL (Hardware-in-the-Loop), EMI/EMC verification, and system integration testing to guarantee reliability, safety, and compliance.

Whether it’s on-board chargers, motor control systems, touch interfaces, camera subsystems, or medical-grade embedded devices, we support our partners through every phase of development, from concept to production.

Výsledkem našeho úsilí je ucelené řešení, které nejen splňuje všechny požadavky na funkčnost, ale také nabízí hmatatelné výhody v dlouhodobém horizontu.

V čem vám můžeme být nápomocní?
Máme široký záběr odborností a můžeme vám nabídnout hodnotná řešení v následujících 7 oblastech:

1.	ICT Analýzy: Nabízíme hloubkové analýzy v oblasti informačních a komunikačních technologií, abyste byli vždy v přední linii inovací.

2.	Služby Enterprise Architektury: Vycházíme z osvědčené metodiky TOGAF 9, což nám umožňuje navrhnout architekturu, která je robustní a zároveň flexibilní.

3.	Selekce Dodavatelů HW a SW: Díky naší znalosti trhu vám pomůžeme vybrat ty nejlepší dodavatele hardwaru a softwaru.

4.	Projektový Management: Aplikujeme metodiku PRINCE2, doplněnou o po-implementační monitoring, abychom zajistili, že vaše projekty budou úspěšné od začátku až do konce.

5.	Bezpečnostní Řešení: Nabízíme komplexní bezpečnostní řešení, včetně kyberbezpečnosti, pro maximální ochranu vašich dat a systémů a celého podníku.

6.	Automatizace Procesů: Specializujeme se na integraci procesní platformy APLISO do vašich stávajících ERP systémů. S využitím IoT a AI zajišťujeme optimalizaci a automatizaci vašich procesů.

7.	Implementace ERP řešení Qi: Nabízíme expertní znalosti a zkušenosti s implementací tohoto řešení pro maximalizaci vašeho podnikání. 

Specializované Projekty:
Jsme hrdi na naše zapojení do IoT projektů v oblasti SmartCities a Průmyslu 4.0. Spolupracujeme s CIIRC ČVÚT v rámci programu SmartCity – Centrum města budoucnosti. V rámci této spolupráce využíváme laboratoře ve spolupráci s Českým institutem informatiky, robotiky a kybernetiky

Name: Cryptodem
Description:
We are a cybersecurity startup redefining mobile hardware security by embedding post-quantum cryptography (PQC), side-channel-resistant algorithms, and a hardware Root of Trust (RoT) directly into cellular modem platforms and their connected secure peripherals.

We are building a quantum-resilient security architecture from the ground up. Our solution integrates lightweight PQC primitives—aligned with NIST standards—into the modem’s communication stack to ensure long-term confidentiality, even against store-now-decrypt-later attacks.

To defend against physical attacks, our cryptographic implementations are engineered for resistance to side-channel threats such as power analysis, fault injection, and electromagnetic leakage—safeguarding not just the modem, but also any connected secure elements, SIMs, and embedded devices.

At the core of our system is a tamper-resistant Root of Trust—a secure enclave that anchors device identity, key management, and trusted boot. We extend this trust to peripherals and sensors, enabling a secure-by-design hardware ecosystem for critical applications in IoT, defense, mobile, and autonomous infrastructure.

Our mission is to secure wireless communications at the silicon level, preparing the mobile edge for a post-quantum, high-threat future.

Name: de Jonge GmbH
Description:
de Jonge GmbH develops energy-efficient embedded AI solutions for industrial systems. The goal is to make AI available exactly where data is generated: in machines, sensors, and existing equipment. 

At the core is an inline approach: with EdgeBrain, a plug-and-play AI module, AI can be integrated between sensor and host without cloud dependency and without changes to existing IT/OT architectures. This enables inspection, monitoring, and decision processes to run deterministically, fast, and energy-efficiently directly at the system - from quality inspection to sensor fusion and condition monitoring. 

Customers benefit from AI that delivers strong performance at low power, integrates seamlessly into real production environments, and keeps its decisions transparent and traceable. Optionally, EdgeBrain supports bidirectional post-quantum-secure encryption for especially secure local or hybrid setups. 

And in the end, it’s exactly this ambition that drives us: precision, craftsmanship, and attention to detail - engineered in Nuremberg, with a hint of Dürer.

Name: Symphony
Description:
Symphony provides a practical way to enable data storytelling and collaboration across your mixed analytics landscape.  Combine Tableau, Power BI, Qlik, etc. to engage internal or external users.  Let your company use a toolbox of analytics, and use Symphony to tell stories across silos, engage users, and learn what analytics are being used actively.

Symphony started as a bespoke service that our team provided to our advisory clients.  Those clients needed us to provide data engineering and analytics development to solve their problems, which was our pleasure to do. We quickly realized that they needed more than just the dashboard. They needed our expertise and their own business context baked into the data and analytics as they used the analytics and dashboards to drive performance improvements. This usually gets solved by spending a lot of time developing static reports, Powerpoints and emails with screenshots. Thus began our journey to provide practical collaboration and storytelling for the non-technical business user. 

It was also apparent that organizations continued to build their analytical "muscle" in-house...which was a good thing! We noticed that-- for good reason-- different business units acquired different analytical tools ranging from Tableau to Power BI to Qlik. Decision-makers now face a growing problem: without analysts wasting time to pull certain information into a slide deck, it is very difficult to make a decision if the most relevant tools or dashboards live in different software. And, it's even more difficult to tie the data, insights, and decision-making process to ACTION. We want to solve this. 

Symphony unlocks your best thinking to the world. Through practical orchestration of your people, their thoughts, and data and analytics living in any tool, you can quickly share, act, and inspire the people you work with in a data-driven way.

Specialties: Hostel Management Software, Parent Communication App, Student Safety & Well-being, Warden Efficiency, Residential School Technology, Parental Engagement, EdTech, and School Administration SaaS.

Name: Zygos Technologies
Description:
Asset-centric industries around the globe continue to pursue digital transformation and to incorporate innovative digital technologies into their businesses and operations. Zygos Technologies believes the opportunity exists to enable the asset-centric industries to visualize their assets and their critical business information in an entirely new way – through vivid, interactive, 3D digital replicas of their assets.

Overcoming the excessive costs and technical limitations of traditional laser scanning and photogrammetry, Zygos Technologies’ proprietary 3D reality capture process and interactive collaboration platform will deliver the most robust 3D models available, enabling asset owner-operators to rapidly visualize their physical assets along with the array of enterprise systems, data, documents, and information that are associated with those assets.

Our key differentiators include our ability to rapidly create vivid, accurate digital replicas – often in just a few hours using nothing more than a cell phone’s camera - versus weeks or months using more traditional laser scanning or photogrammetry methods, along with our ability to create the entire asset structure and hierarchy within a facility.

This structural hierarchy enables us to integrate our platform and 3D models with the range of enterprise systems within an organization, unlocking greater operational insights and value across the enterprise. We have the ability to keep these digital twins current with as-built assets, enabling a path to merging the physical reality with a powerful virtual tool.

Name: Etablir Solutions
Description:
Our methodology

Etablir's Forecasting & Order Management application uses advanced algorithms to generate optimal suggested quantities for inventory procurement. These suggestions are based on highly accurate forecasts of future demand. The application also empowers users to prioritize orders while accommodating various constraints and limitations.

This comprehensive approach supports complex scenarios such as multi-level supply chains, replenishment from vendors to distribution centers, and from vendors to individual retail stores. Etablir's Auto-Replenishment module leverages precise demand forecasts to automate the determination of shipment quantities. It also allocates these products strategically within an organizational hierarchy. This module is incredibly adaptable and can support various replenishment processes, including those that involve constrained inventory, multi-level supply chains, and omnichannel distribution. It can also cater to specific events that trigger replenishment activities.

Effortlessly streamlining the allocation process across the entire omni-channel retail network is possible using Etablir's allocation solution. This tool takes into account diverse factors such as the performance of each location and product, the existing stock levels at different points, the distribution of product assortments, and other pertinent business-specific considerations like size patterns or packaging configurations.

Etablir's model, which employs an advanced predictive analytics engine, considers every conceivable factor influencing the retail supply chain. The system then formulates optimal inter-store transfer recommendations, efficiently moving merchandise from underperforming stores to those experiencing high demand and stockouts for the same products.

Name: Rentee | SaaS financiero para gestores de viviendas vacacionales: Paga, factura, concilia en 1 click
Description:
Rentee es la plataforma financiera completa para gestores vacacionales, diseñada para transformar la manera en que administran sus finanzas. Su misión es clara: pasar del caos financiero a la claridad total, eliminando Excel, errores y tareas manuales que consumen horas cada semana.
Rentee conecta bancos y PMS para que cada ingreso, gasto y movimiento se concilie automáticamente, generando liquidaciones, facturas y reportes profesionales sin intervención manual. Esto permite a los gestores reducir hasta un 80 % de sus tareas repetitivas, ganar precisión y mejorar la transparencia con sus propietarios.

La plataforma ofrece dos niveles complementarios:

Rentee Flow permite controlar y conciliar finanzas sin cambiar de banco. Conecta cuentas, detecta duplicidades, centraliza ingresos y gastos y genera liquidaciones automáticas con total trazabilidad.

Rentee Wallet lleva la automatización más lejos: permite recargar un wallet seguro y delegar por completo la ejecución de pagos, split payments y liquidaciones sin tocar el banco. Basta con cargar el importe necesario y Rentee se ocupa del resto.

El sistema incorpora Verifactu, conciliación con IA, dashboards en tiempo real, acceso segmentado por usuario y reportes automáticos con la marca del gestor para reforzar la confianza y reducir consultas. Rentee muestra ingresos, gastos y rentabilidad por propiedad y por propietario, detecta fallos en procesos y ayuda a mejorar márgenes.

Los testimonios de gestores de toda España confirman el impacto: horas ahorradas, transparencia total y la sensación de contar con un “director financiero” dentro del equipo.
Rentee se integra con PMS líderes (AvaiBook, Avantio, Icnea, etc.) y bancos de primer nivel, adaptándose al flujo del gestor para evitar duplicidades.
Location: Pozuelo de Alarcón, Community of Madrid

Name: AgendasNet
Description:
A AgendasNet é software de gestão de agenda, trata-se de uma solução inovadora que utiliza elementos de inteligência artificial para otimizar a organização de compromissos e reduzir significativamente o número de faltas (no-show). Com uma série de funcionalidades avançadas, nosso sistema oferece uma experiência de gerenciamento completa e eficiente, adaptando-se perfeitamente às necessidades de empresas e profissionais de diversos setores.

Entre os recursos mais notáveis estão a confirmação automática de comparecimento e a realocação automatizada de compromissos, que garantem uma gestão de agenda proativa e dinâmica. Através de uma grade de disponibilidade por serviço e recursos, o sistema permite que os usuários filtrem e reservem espaços na agenda de forma prática e intuitiva. Além disso, a fila de espera inteligente com realocação dinâmica assegura que nenhuma vaga fique ociosa, maximizando o aproveitamento do tempo disponível.

Nosso software também facilita a comunicação com clientes e equipes, oferecendo integração com os principais provedores de email e permitindo o envio de mensagens por WhatsApp e email. Alertas configuráveis de proximidade do evento agendado garantem que todos estejam sempre informados e preparados para os compromissos, enquanto o agendamento de retorno automatizado simplifica a gestão de follow-ups e consultas futuras.

Além de otimizar a gestão de agendas, nosso sistema proporciona uma administração financeira robusta, com ferramentas para a gestão de recebíveis e repasses, manutenção de pagamentos recorrentes e controle de inadimplência. A gestão de contratos, planos de atendimento e permissões de acesso também é facilitada, garantindo que todas as operações ocorram de forma segura e organizada.

Com um foco constante na eficiência e na satisfação do usuário, nosso software de gestão de agenda é a escolha ideal para quem busca um sistema completo, inteligente e altamente funcional.

Meanwhile, landlords struggle to manage short-term stays and meet the evolving expectations of today’s renters.

How can we use technology, and AI, to unlock this underutilized supply? How might we collaborate with institutional landlords and their residents to rethink what a lease can do?

Name: Elanna
Description:
Elanna dissolves the boundary between data and intuition.
Our presence-based AI listens in real time, senses context, and surfaces insights that resonate with both rigorous analytics and the quiet certainty of lived experience. The result? Decisions that feel as right as they are smart.

Why we exist

In a world flooded with dashboards and gut feelings, leaders still struggle to connect cold numbers with human nuance. We believe future-ready decisions must honor both. Elanna’s mission is to democratize that fusion, empowering every company—no matter its size—to act with the confidence of deep knowing backed by data science.

How we do it
	1.	Presence-based AI – Continuous context awareness lets Elanna deliver the right metric or narrative exactly when it matters.
	2.	Unified Insight Engine – We blend statistical models, machine learning, and semantic search into a single conversational layer. Ask a question, drill into the numbers, or simply seek validation for your hunch; Elanna responds in one coherent voice.
	3.	Human-first Experience – Interfaces are designed for clarity: story-driven summaries for the board, raw data for analysts, and intuitive “confidence markers” that reveal how much each recommendation leans on logic versus intuition.
	4.	Scalable Architecture – Built natively on Google Cloud, Elanna scales from startup agility to enterprise complexity without friction.

What you gain
	•	Decisions in half the time—our users report up to a 40 % drop in analysis cycles.
	•	Shared confidence—cross-functional teams align faster because the numbers and the narrative arrive together.
	•	Continuous learning—every interaction refines our models, tailoring future guidance to your unique pulse.

Join the journey

We’re building the bridge between analytics and instinct. Whether you’re a data scientist chasing actionable context, a strategist craving sharper foresight, or an investor betting on the next generation of decision tech, we’d love to connect.

Follow Elanna

Name: SineWave GmbH
Description:
SineWave GmbH specializes in Software Engineering and Consulting for technical applications. The company's strengths lie in programming with Matlab/Simulink and in the knowledge about ABB's AC 800PEC control platform. But also other toolboxes, programming languages and applications are part of the company's portfolio.

Amongst others, SineWave GmbH offers you the following services:

Software Engineering
  - Writing of Matlab m-scripts. For example, for data analysis and calculations, or to perform automated operations.
  - Model-based design in Simulink. Simulations, generation and execution of C-code in real-time environments.
  - Creation of dynamic-link libraries (DLL) and stand-alone applications (EXE) to protect intellectual property.
  - Code optimizations / Performance optimizations.
  - Unit testing and documentation of Simulink models.
  - PLC-programming according to the IEC 61131-3 standard.

Consulting
  - Introduction to the world of Matlab and Simulink. What are they, what can you do with them?
  - Concept for the modular structure of a Simulink model with reusable components and clearly defined interfaces.
  - Help with the subdivision of a Simulink model into components and library blocks that functionally belong together.
  - Decision-making assistance when selecting the appropriate implementation method (e.g. Stateflow, Logic Blocks, Embedded Matlab Script).
  - Design guidelines (Do's and Dont's) for creating a clean, efficient and high-quality Simulink model.
  - Code reviews and troubleshooting for existing Simulink models.

Data Analysis
  - Analysis of (measurement) data using Matlab or Python. Read, filter, calculate, store, display.

Impressum: https://sinewave.ch/en/impressum.html

Name: Thinking OS
Description:
In a world where every organization is rushing to use AI, 𝗧𝗵𝗶𝗻𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗢𝗦 provides the missing safety and control layer.

We are not an AI model, a chatbot, or a productivity tool. We are a 𝘀𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗱 𝗷𝘂𝗱𝗴𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗺𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿 that sits at the boundary between your legal workflows and the outside world and enforces one simple rule:

𝗢𝗻𝗹𝘆 𝘀𝗮𝗳𝗲, 𝗮𝘂𝘁𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗶𝘇𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗮𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄𝗲𝗱 𝘁𝗼 𝗺𝗼𝘃𝗲.

Our flagship runtime, 𝗦𝗘𝗔𝗟 𝗟𝗲𝗴𝗮𝗹, is a refusal-first enforcement layer for law firms, legal departments, and legal tech vendors. It doesn’t generate content. It decides, under seal:

  • 𝘸𝘩𝘦𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳 𝘢 𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘧𝘪𝘤 𝘱𝘦𝘳𝘴𝘰𝘯 𝘰𝘳 𝘴𝘺𝘴𝘵𝘦𝘮 𝘪𝘴 𝘢𝘭𝘭𝘰𝘸𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘥𝘰 𝘢 𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘧𝘪𝘤 𝘭𝘦𝘨𝘢𝘭 𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯,
  • 𝘪𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘦𝘹𝘵, 𝘶𝘯𝘥𝘦𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴 𝘢𝘶𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘳𝘪𝘵𝘺 — 𝘺𝘦𝘴 𝘰𝘳 𝘯𝘰.

When SEAL refuses, it blocks the action and emits a sealed refusal artifact.
When SEAL allows, it clears the action and emits a sealed approval artifact.

𝗔𝗜 𝗟𝗶𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆
We operate on a 𝗿𝗲𝗳𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗹-𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁 principle, acting like a strict referee that blocks unsafe, out-of-scope, or non-compliant decisions 𝗯𝗲𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗲 AI or automation executes. This structurally reduces risks like hallucinations, drift, and unauthorized filings.

𝗚𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗲𝗱 𝗘𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲, 𝗡𝗼𝘁 𝗝𝘂𝘀𝘁 𝗦𝗽𝗲𝗲𝗱
Where most AI tools focus on generating faster answers, Thinking OS focuses on 𝗴𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀 and 𝘀𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗲𝗱 𝗲𝘃𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲. The result: execution that earns trust — with artifacts your GC, ethics counsel, or regulator can actually use.

We don’t automate work.
𝗪𝗲 𝗴𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗻 𝘄𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗻𝘀 𝘁𝗵𝗲 𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 𝘁𝗼 𝗯𝗲 𝗮𝘂𝘁𝗼𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱.

Description:
ECCA-compliant scholarship management platform streamlining operations for SGOs nationwide.

Vouchive is the premier SaaS solution designed specifically for Scholarship Granting Organizations (SGOs) navigating the Educational Choice for Children Act (ECCA). Our comprehensive platform transforms how SGOs process applications, verify income, manage funds, and maintain regulatory compliance.

Complete ECCA Compliance:

Automated income verification supporting all five ECCA-mandated methods
Separate account tracking preventing co-mingling of qualified contributions
Administrative expense monitoring with 10% safe harbor compliance
Distribution timeline tracking ensuring three-year requirements are met
Sibling priority system for scholarship allocation
Comprehensive audit preparation and CPA integration

Streamlined Operations:

Intuitive application processing from submission to approval
Vendor management with student claim and transfer systems
Sponsor/donor management with tax credit documentation
Multi-tier user system with role-based permissions
Mobile-friendly interfaces for families, vendors, and sponsors

Our secure cloud-based platform reduces administrative burden by up to 75% while ensuring complete compliance with all ECCA requirements. SGOs maintain full control over scholarship decisions while we handle the technical complexity.

Vouchive processes applications for eligible students (up to 300% AMI), manages sponsor donations within federal tax credit limits (10% AGI/$5k individual, 5% taxable income corporate), and ensures SGOs maintain proper distribution timelines and financial segregation.

Whether you're an established SGO or preparing to launch under new ECCA guidelines, Vouchive provides the technology infrastructure to scale operations efficiently while maintaining regulatory compliance.

At the core of the business is a scalable embedded commerce network: distribution partners on one side, carriers and advertisers on the other, connected through a technology layer that supports real-time personalization, compliant data activation, and seamless integration. We develop and supply our proprietary and standard technologies and products, we customize them to specific conditions and requirements of our customers. 

Our mainstream is speech technologies and a voice communication: 
- innovative methods of speech compression (of a speech coding),
- speech enhancement (noise and echo cancellation, spectrum equalization, etc.),
- error control coding (channel coding),
- advanced methods of "joint source-channel coding",
- voice-band low-latency modems,
- etc.

We create innovative high-quality vocoders robust to acoustic noises as well as to any channel errors.

All our proprietary vocoders (TWELP, SPR, etc.) are free of any third-parties' patents and have superior characteristics in comparison with the well-known vocoders at the same bit rates. 

We are a team of scientists, software and hardware engineers, developers and programmers, young talents and reputable experts with a great experience in Digital Signal Processing and a development of unique technologies and products for various telecommunication equipment and other applications in IT-domain.

Our products are used in: 

- a wire and wireless communication equipment,
- Digital Radio, including mobile radio, Software Defined Radio and HF/VHF/UHF transceivers,
- VoIP devices and various PC applications, 
- answering machines, speaking games and in many other devices.

Having a great experience not only in development of mathematically intensive algorithms and software, but also in a hardware design, a production, a testing and an exploitation of various radio and telecommunication equipment, we use our strong background to satisfy the requirements of our customers and to provide each one of them with the most advantageous solution.

Name: RECVR
Description:
RECVR — The Checkout Recovery Layer for Shopify

Checkout is the least-optimised space in eCommerce — yet it’s where every decision gets made. Most brands obsess over traffic and conversion, but ignore the final step: recovery.

RECVR gives Shopify brands full visibility and control inside checkout — starting with discount code validation and recovery. When customers use an invalid code, RECVR steps in to display approved, margin-safe alternatives, turning failed checkouts into saved sales.

Behind the scenes, it tracks discount usage, affiliate code leakage, and broken promos — giving brands their first-ever analytics layer for what actually happens at checkout. No more black box. Just clean, actionable insight on what’s driving conversions and what’s being lost.

Next up: flow-based discounts, loyalty integrations, auto code scheduling, and real-time checkout reporting.

Because recovery isn’t just about winning a lost sale - it’s about optimising the point of decision itself.

The live tracking tool also allows you to assign tasks to your installation team, set deadlines, and receive automated notifications when tasks are completed or delayed. You can even monitor the performance of individual team members to ensure that installation is being carried out efficiently and according to your quality standards.

Don't waste any more time and resources tracking installations manually. With our live tracking tool, you can streamline your POSM installation process and focus on growing your business. Sign up today to take your POSM installation tracking to the next level!

Name: APPM Solutions S.A.
Description:
APPM Solutions S.A. es una empresa nativa digital, nacida en el año 2020 en San Francisco, Córdoba, con el objetivo de agregar valor al ecosistema médico, mediante el diseño e implementación de soluciones tecnológicas que permitan un flujo óptimo de información hacia el médico, en base a criterios y filtros intuitivos, siempre poniendo foco
en la mejora continua y en la experiencia del usuario.
Desarrollamos "APPM Oncología", aplicación para uso de profesionales médicos y laboratorios farmacéuticos, enfocada al sector oncológico.
Una solución tecnológica única y de gran ayuda en la atención médica diaria, acceso a
información necesaria y nexo con los diferentes actores de la industria farmacéutica.

El flujo desordenado y caótico de datos se transforma en desinformación, al no disponer
de ellos de manera ágil y actualizada.
Existe gran cantidad de fuentes de información poco amigables y que responden al interés
que solo una parte de la comunidad necesita de los mismos.
Desde APPM SOLUTIONS buscamos y pensamos como plantear una solución a esas
dificultades, constituyéndonos en la herramienta digital y personalizada que une la búsqueda al objetivo planteado, tanto en el consultorio como en áreas comerciales.
Es por ello que desarrollamos una herramienta tecnológica para el sector oncológico, denominada “APPM Oncología”, consultando, escuchando y analizando necesidades de diferentes equipos interdisciplinarios; referentes médicos, ONG´s y otros actores del
sector, logrando de este modo crear un canal innovador y complementario.

Esta aplicación posibilita acercar información actualizada, personalizada, relevante y
comparable, al alcance del profesional a través de su dispositivo móvil.

La utilización de APPM Oncología permite unir en una sola aplicación, funcionalidades de varias herramientas que hoy existen en diferentes formatos y fuentes de información (burocracia en el flujo de la misma) y por las que hoy se destinan importantes recursos.

Name: CraneNav
Description:
CRANENAV OVERVIEW

CraneNav is a permit-aware navigation service designed specifically for mobile cranes. In a nutshell, CraneNav can ingest annual permits issued by roading authorities — particularly bridge data — and transpose this information onto a digital map on your mobile device.

When you select a destination (just like in Waze or Google Maps), CraneNav retrieves all relevant bridge data within the route corridor for your crane. It then calculates a compliant route, automatically avoiding “DO NOT CROSS” bridges, removing surplus bridges, and setting the path. Should drivers deviate from the planned route, CraneNav instantly recalculates a new compliant route.

⸻

BENEFITS
	•	Save time on route planning
	•	Minimise errors and ensure compliance
	•	Audio alerts for bridge speeds and crossing conditions
	•	Automatic route recalculation
	•	Easy setup — CraneNav is a Progressive Web App (PWA). There is no need to install a traditional app. It works on any device with a browser and internet connection.

⸻

OUR VISION
CraneNav was born from a vision to revolutionise crane navigation through a permit-aware solution. Our platform converts digital permits into real-time navigation data, empowering crane operators with unmatched safety and compliance. We are committed to shaping the future of crane operations with innovative IT solutions.

⸻

OUR STORY
Founder Dave McLeod, whose two sons work in the mobile crane sector, saw first-hand how pre-trip planning is a major pain point — ensuring compliance while staying within permit conditions. CraneNav was created to solve this challenge.

Name: QMB Tech
Description:
I founded Quarter Mile Base Technologies in 2022. The company name pays homage to several values I had in mind when starting the company: tenacity, pride in quality work, and a sense of community. Quarter Mile Base was the citizen band radio handle for the farm where my mother grew up. The family farm had CB radios in the combine, tractor, grain truck, and the farmhouse; whenever someone needed something in the field, the request always arrived at the house through the CB radio starting with “Quarter Mile Base, are you by? …”

Tenacity, admiring a job well done, and a strong sense of community are central themes in many rural Saskatchewan settings–our farm and community were no exception. We strive to exemplify the best of these qualities in the work we do at QMB Tech.

A strong affinity for finding solutions to practical problems was also a result of growing up in rural Saskatchewan. Like many other proud companies in the Canadian prairies, we focus on providing innovative pragmatic solutions to our clients and customers in the tech sector. Our strong expertise in the fields of engineering, electronics, embedded technology, software, and technical sales underpins this pragmatic outlook to provide effective solutions for the challenges of today.

I encourage you to reach out and start the discussion on how we can deliver solutions that create an impact for you today: jordan.clarke@qmbtech.com.

-Jordan

Name: Hello Spark
Description:
Ever tried an AI chatbot that completely falls apart the moment someone asks a question it wasn't expecting? Yeah, we've all been there.

Most AI feels like talking to a very expensive parking meter – technically functional, but about as personable as a brick wall. And honestly? Small businesses deserve so much better than that.

We're Hello Spark, and we're kind of obsessed with building AI that actually gets it. Not the generic, one-size-fits-all stuff that sounds like it was written by a committee of robots, but AI that understands your business, your customers, and all those little nuances that make your company unique.

Here's how we think about it: instead of slapping generic AI onto your problems and hoping for the best, we actually take the time to understand what you're dealing with. We train our AI on your specific situations, your actual customer conversations, and the way your industry really works. The result? AI that feels more like a really good team member and less like a malfunctioning vending machine.

We love helping with those repetitive front-end tasks that eat up your day – you know, the customer inquiries, appointment scheduling, initial qualifying, all that stuff that needs to get done but doesn't exactly light up your day. The difference is, we don't just automate everything and call it good. We make sure there's always a smooth handoff to actual humans when the conversation calls for that personal touch.

Our whole thing is pretty straightforward: we get to know your business, build AI that actually speaks like a human being, handle the routine stuff so you can focus on what matters, and make sure every customer feels heard and valued.
Small businesses shouldn't have to choose between being efficient and being authentic. Turns out, you can have both.

If you're curious about what AI looks like when it's actually built for your business instead of against it, we'd love to chat.

Description:
BudgetXpert: Enterprise Planning & Budgeting Platform

Transform your organization's financial planning with BudgetXpert - the comprehensive SaaS solution that streamlines your entire budgeting cycle from strategic setup to execution and analysis.

About BudgetXpert

BudgetXpert is an enterprise-grade financial planning platform that transforms the complex budgeting process into a streamlined, collaborative workflow. Our solution integrates strategic planning, budget development, execution monitoring, and advanced analytics into a single, powerful ecosystem that aligns your financial management with strategic objectives.

What We Offer

End-to-End Budget Management
From organizational setup and account definition to monitoring execution and variance analysis, BudgetXpert covers every phase of the budget lifecycle with purpose-built modules that work seamlessly together.

Strategic Alignment
Translate your strategic priorities into actionable financial targets with our Guidelines & Goals framework, ensuring every dollar allocated supports your organization's direction.

Assumption-Driven Planning
Build forecasts on well-documented, validated assumptions with our structured Assumptions framework, creating a foundation for meaningful variance analysis and continuous improvement.

Scenario Planning
Prepare for uncertainty with robust scenario modeling capabilities that let you develop base, optimistic, and conservative projections while mapping contingency plans for each scenario.

Collaborative Workflow
Engage stakeholders across all organizational levels with role-based interfaces, approval workflows, and clear accountability frameworks that foster a culture of financial discipline.

Name: iLeniaSoft SPA
Description:
#iLeniaSoft es creadora del primer software (QR) de trazabilidad total de la leña, que permite la gestión digital de stock, monitoreo a distancia de la leña transada desde el origen hasta su consumo, mediante el registro de origen, especie, calibre, contenido de humedad, talla o dimensiones, guía, factura o boleta.
Junto a la empresa energiainteligente, trabajan de manera complementaria para ofrecer una solución integral al mercado de la leña que permita brindar garantías de calidad al consumidor final, además de asegurar la autenticidad y sostenibilidad del producto comercializado.
#energiainteligente, empresa dedicada a las energías limpias, diseñó y construyó el primer secador solar de leña de alta eficiencia, en el país, con una capacidad de entre 4.000 y 15.000 m3, en nuestra Planta Las Lumas, ciudad de Osorno, Región de los Lagos.
 Nuestro producto es un saco de leña seca de eucaliptus glóbulus o nitens, obtenida de productores locales con planes de manejo y guías de libre tránsito, marca iLenia, con sello de calidad, con QR que permite leer la importante información sobre su trazabilidad.
El formato es un saco blanco de polipropileno de 12 kilos, ideal para transportar en vehículo, liviano y fácil de almacenar, con un porcentaje de humedad bajo el 25 %, obtenido luego del proceso en nuestro secador solar de alta eficiencia.
Por años hemos estado a la vanguardia y hoy más que nunca con la promulgación de la ley 21.499 que reconoce y regula entre otros a la #leñaseca como biocombustible sólido, tenemos objetivamente, una ventaja competitiva.
Junto con ello nuestros valores están por debajo de la competencia, según estudios de mercado.
Les compartimos nuestra intención de crear lazos comerciales con actores de la región, que concuerden con nuestra iniciativa de un fuerte enfoque en la responsabilidad social y #responsabilidadmedioambiental, en el fomento y apoyo a la producción de leña proveniente de bosques cultivados y manejados de manera sostenible.

Name: IBot.run
Description:
iBot.run, Discord sunucuları için özel olarak tasarlanmış bir bot yazılımıdır. Bu bot, sunucu yöneticilerine ve kullanıcılarına birçok farklı özellik sunar. Örneğin, iBot.run ile sunucu yöneticileri:

Otomatik mesajlar gönderebilirler. Örneğin, bir kullanıcı sunucuya katıldığında ya da bir oyun oynandığında otomatik bir mesaj gönderebilirler.

Rol yönetimi yapabilirler. Örneğin, kullanıcıların rollere atanmasını, rol isimlerini ve renklerini değiştirebilirler.

Kullanıcı yasaklama ve engelleme işlemleri gerçekleştirebilirler. Örneğin, bir kullanıcının sunucudan atılmasını ya da bir süre boyunca yasaklanmasını sağlayabilirler.

Anketler oluşturabilirler. Örneğin, sunucudaki kullanıcıların fikirlerini almak için bir anket oluşturabilirler.

Sesli odalar yönetebilirler. Örneğin, sesli odaların isimlerini ve kapasitelerini değiştirebilirler.

iBot.run ayrıca, kullanıcılar tarafından oluşturulan özel komutlar ve işlevleri destekler. Bu sayede, kullanıcılar sunucuda daha kişisel bir deneyim yaşayabilirler. Örneğin, kullanıcılar kendilerine özel bir komut yazıp bunu sunucuda kullanabilirler.

Bu bot yazılımı ile sunucu yöneticileri daha etkili bir şekilde sunucularını yönetebilir ve kullanıcılar daha keyifli bir deneyim yaşayabilir. iBot.run, kullanıcı dostu arayüzü ve kullanımı kolay özellikleri ile sunucu yöneticilerine ve kullanıcılarına önemli bir katkı sağlar.

Output.ai exists to remove that friction.

Output.ai operates using a vertical-focused model.

Once proven, those frameworks are adapted to other industries with similar operational challenges.

Staff360 is our first vertical, focused on staffing and recruitment organizations, and serves as a proof point for how Output.ai designs and delivers productivity systems.

Automation should remove robotic work, not human value. When done correctly, it makes teams faster, clearer, and more effective without changing what makes them human.

Output.ai builds systems that work in the real world and create real output.

Name: VERIWINE
Description:
THE CHALLENGES

Every year, counterfeiting, black and grey markets cause around $20 billion worth of damage to the wine industry.
  
The industry is fragmented.

Authenticity control is not easy for wine lovers.

THE SOLUTION:  VERIWINE

We connect winemakers, merchants, and connoisseurs.

We bring integrity to the whole supply chain

We make direct communication possible.

HOW DOES IT WORK?
VERIWINE is based on a ledger database. Here are the most important elements that create trust and many new possibilities:

An individual tag on each wine bottle guarantees its authenticity and integrity throughout the whole supply chain.

Sensors prove that a bottle of wine has always been stored optimally. They can also be used in agriculture and provide information about temperatures and rainfall during cultivation, for example.

The ledger based network allows all users to see and edit data. This is how events (purchase, storage, transport, resale, etc.) are recorded.

Each participant (winemaker, merchant) has access to their own data in a separate database. They can be shared with partners (for free or for a fee).

ARE YOU INTERESTED IN THE DETAILS?

Learn more about VERIWINE and its benefits for you personally. Visit our website veriwine.net or send us an email at cheers@veriwine.net

Name: TradeTender
Description:
TradeTender is a next-generation platform built to solve one big problem: the chaos of quoting. From missed deadlines to buried emails, mid-tier contractors often struggle with outdated systems.

We're on a mission to transform how construction professionals manage tenders and quotes, bringing efficiency and transparency to an industry that's been overlooked by technology.

Born out of real industry frustrations, TradeTender was built for the boots-on-the-ground workforce. Our founders spent years working in commercial construction, experiencing firsthand the chaos of tender management:

✕ Missed emails with critical quote information
✕ Excel spreadsheets that couldn't properly compare quotes
✕ Hours spent manually entering data from PDFs
✕ No visibility into which suppliers had seen the tender

In 2024, we assembled a team of construction professionals and software engineers to build the solution we wished we had. TradeTender launched with a focus on mid-tier commercial construction projects — where the complexity is high but the existing solutions are inadequate.

Our Core Values

#Industry Expertise - We're not just tech people. Our team brings decades of combined experience in commercial contracting, ensuring our platform addresses real-world challenges.

Practical Innovation - We focus on innovations that deliver immediate value. No gimmicks — just features that save time and help win more work.

Community First - We believe in building relationships, not just transactions. TradeTender fosters connections between contractors and subbies that extend beyond individual projects.

Excellence in Execution - Like in construction, we believe in getting the details right. Our platform is built with the same commitment to quality that our users bring to their projects.

Be part of the movement to modernize construction tender management. Whether you're posting jobs or quoting on them, TradeTender helps you work smarter, not harder.

Name: Aquador
Description:
Welcome to Aquador's official LinkedIn page! We are dedicated to creating innovative fire safety solutions that utilize the power of Artificial Intelligence to protect lives and property from the devastating effects of fire.
At Aquador, we understand the critical importance of early fire detection and swift action. Our advanced fire safety system combines state-of-the-art technology with intelligent algorithms to accurately identify & locate fires in real time. By leveraging computer vision and machine learning, our AI-powered solution can detect fires at their earliest stages, even in challenging environments.
What sets Aquador apart is our commitment to proactive fire suppression. Once a fire is detected, our intelligent system swiftly initiates the suppression process, deploying targeted measures to contain and extinguish the fire before it can spread further. This automated approach significantly reduces response time and minimizes damage, ultimately saving lives and property.
Our solution also provides valuable data insights for fire prevention and emergency preparedness. Our system can identify potential risks by analyzing patterns & trends in fire incidents, allowing for proactive measures to mitigate fire hazards and enhance overall fire safety protocols.
We are proud to offer a comprehensive fire safety solution that is reliable, efficient, and adaptable to various settings including homes, offices, public spaces, etc. Our team of experts is dedicated to ensuring the highest safety and performance standards, continuously refining and enhancing our technology to stay ahead of emerging fire safety challenges.
Join us on this journey toward a safer future. Like our page to stay updated on the latest advancements in fire safety technology. We are excited to engage with you and create a community dedicated to fire safety awareness and prevention.
Remember, fire safety is everyone's responsibility. Together, let's make a difference and protect what matters most.

Name: Baseera Embedded Consultants
Description:
At Baseera Embedded Consultants, we specialize in full‑stack embedded systems engineering. From low‑level driver development and RTOS integration to performance tuning, networking, and DevOps for firmware platforms.

With nearly a decade of hands‑on experience in advanced embedded and automotive systems, we’ve supported programs involving safety‑critical microcontrollers, complex Ethernet topologies, and large‑scale firmware platforms. Our focus is on helping teams design scalable architectures, automate testing and release flows, and build reliable systems that move from prototype to production with confidence.

What Drives Us

We believe clarity leads to better systems. That means firmware that’s modular, maintainable, and measurable. All supported by modern solutions in the realm of embedded software. We bring this philosophy to every engagement, enabling faster development cycles without sacrificing robustness or safety.

Core Capabilities

Firmware Architecture & Platform Design – RTOS setup and configuration, task scheduling algorithms that best suit your product

Embedded DevOps – CI/CD, automated testing, build pipelines, and release orchestration

Networking & Communication – UART, SPI, CAN, I²C, MDIO/SMI, TCP/IP stacks, Ethernet MAC/PHYs & switches

Performance & Integration – RTOS performance analysis/tuning, TCP/IP stack performance analysis/tuning, Ethernet MAC throughput analysis/tuning

Toolchains & Ecosystems – GCC, Tasking, Zephyr, FreeRTOS, ESP-IDF

Consulting availability: Hourly or project‑based engagements
Location: U.S.‑based (Pacific Time), remote‑friendly

At Molequle, we're pioneering the future of business insights with our state-of-the-art B2B Software as a Service product. Our innovative platform is designed to revolutionize how businesses understand their customers, harnessing the power of clean, accurate data to fuel smarter decisions and strategies. Molequle is structured around three core product layers, each integral to transforming data into actionable intelligence.

- Platform Layer: The bedrock of Molequle's service, our Platform Layer, is focused on the accurate and unified collection of data. Recognizing that clean data is the foundation for transformative insights, we've developed sophisticated tools to ingest data from various systems, creating a unified dataset brimming with accurate, actionable information.

- Intelligence Layer: At the heart of Molequle is our Intelligence Layer, where data meets decision-making. Utilizing cutting-edge AI technologies, we empower marketing and sales professionals to revolutionize their approach to customer insights. Our intelligent algorithms analyze the unified data set, uncovering patterns and trends that can guide more informed, strategic decisions. This layer is about transforming raw data into a competitive edge, enabling our clients to stay several steps ahead in their industries.

- Application Layer: The final piece of the Molequle puzzle, our Application Layer, offers unparalleled access to insights generated across the platform. Whether through our pre-built applications, such as sales intelligence tools and a proprietary browser extension, or through custom applications developed atop Molequle's robust data platform, clients have the flexibility to harness insights in ways that best suit their unique business needs. This layer is dedicated to making sure that the power of Molequle's insights is always at our clients' fingertips, integrated seamlessly into their workflows.

Con la sincronización de disponibilidad,  Syncventory bloqueará en tu tienda de Cornershop     los productos que se queden sin stock en Bsale. De la misma forma, los desbloquará una vez que vuelvan a tener stock.

Con la sincronización de precios, eligirás una lista de precios de Bsale y  luego Syncventory asignará automáticamente estos precios en los productos correspondientes de la tienda de Cornershop.

No es necesario que pierdas tiempo y cometas errores en tareas manuales con tu tienda de Cornershop.  Tenemos un robot para eso y es gratis por un mes. Pruébalo en https://syncventory.cl

Name: ObeeWAN Technologies
Description:
At ObeeWAN, we are reimagining beekeeping with technology that works in harmony with nature. Finding the queen bee is one of the most time-consuming and frustrating challenges in hive management, often taking 30–60 minutes per hive. Our breakthrough solution, the ObeeWAN MindTrick, uses bio-acoustics to gently lure the queen to a specific location in the hive, reducing search time by up to 90%. This non-invasive, organic approach protects bees, saves time, and empowers keepers to make quicker, more confident decisions.

The ObeeWAN App puts hive insights at a beekeeper’s fingertips—activating the MindTrick, cataloging queens, and tracking health metrics over time. As we grow, our CloudWalker AI will analyze community hive data to deliver personalized recommendations, helping keepers optimize hive health and productivity. By combining centuries-old beekeeping knowledge with next-generation tools like AI, cloud computing, and bio-acoustic engineering, we are building a platform that serves beekeepers of every scale—from hobbyists to commercial operators.

Our work is about more than convenience. By making hive management smarter and more precise, we strengthen pollinator populations critical to food security, biodiversity, and sustainable agriculture. Better for beekeepers, better for the planet.
