Name: Shirka
Description:
AI today is fragile. It relies on third-party APIs, depends on cloud infrastructure, and is controlled by a handful of companies. That works for consumer apps. It doesn't work for mission-critical systems.

What is Shirka?
Shirka is the AI Operating System for the next era of intelligent machines. It's an embedded, on-device intelligence layer that runs autonomously, offline, and securely without reliance on external infrastructure.

From laptops and desktops to industrial devices and autonomous systems, Shirka brings intelligence to the machines we use today - and the ones we'll build tomorrow.

Named after the ship's main computer in Ulysses 31, Shirka is the voice-controlled AI we imagined as kids. Operators speak naturally, and Shirka executes, controlling systems, automating workflows, and managing critical infrastructure with precision.

› No interfaces to learn. No complex commands. Just intent.
› It runs where AI needs to work: on metal, not the cloud.
› When it matters most, you don't call an API. You rely on Shirka.

The Next Evolution of AI
› AI should be infrastructure, not an API service. Shirka is built to be embedded, sovereign, and resilient.
› AI should think before it speaks, and plan before it acts. Shirka does this, by design.
› AI should be governed, not micromanaged. Shirka does this through autonomous nodes that act locally, coordinate intelligently, and escalate to humans when needed.
› AI must work when it matters. Finance, Aerospace, and Defense require absolute reliability. Mission-critical industries can't afford AI failure.
› AI shouldn't take months to integrate. Shirka installs in minutes, on user machines or servers - with full enterprise control and the flexibility to extend, govern, and evolve your AI-powered systems at scale.

This is just the beginning.

Tomorrow, Shirka is designed to drive planetary-scale systems, space travel, and humanity's next frontier.

Uplink established… uplink@shirka.co

First contact: Q1 2026

Name: justwhisper.com
Description:
Whisper delivers a unique platform that unifies enterprise-grade asset tracking with mobile engagement, enabling organisations to locate, protect, and optimise high-value assets while connecting people and places through contextual, location-aware interactions.

At its core, Whisper provides a holistic tracking capability purpose-built for real-world operational environments, including retail, transport & logistics, healthcare, and other asset-intensive sectors. Using modern, open standards based technologies such as Bluetooth Low Energy tags and a flexible software architecture, the platform supports diverse use cases—from locating critical equipment and returnable transport items to improving asset availability, utilisation, and audit accuracy across multi-site estates.

Our WhisperNET offers an established enterprise tracking network that enables assets to be located even when they move beyond expected locations. This networked approach reduces reliance on fixed infrastructure or costly data subscriptions and allows asset visibility to extend across operational boundaries, helping organisations recover misplaced, lost, or misappropriated items.

Beyond tracking, Whisper incorporates a powerful mobile engagement layer that transforms location and proximity data into action. The platform supports location-specific messaging for operational communications—such as broadcasting updates to colleagues—as well as targeted, consent-based customer engagement. This capability can operate within Whisper’s own mobile experiences or be seamlessly integrated into an organisation’s existing applications.

Designed for agility and integration, Whisper complements existing enterprise systems and aligns with modern connectivity strategies. The result is a scalable platform that reduces loss, cuts time spent searching for assets, improves operational efficiency, and unlocks new digital engagement opportunities—delivering measurable value from a single, unified solution.

Name: SoftCPS
Description:
SoftCPS Laboratory
The SoftCPS laboratory is a research group of the School of Engineering of the Polytechnic Institute of Porto (ISEP), hosting research activities of Professors and Researchers in the area. Members of the laboratory are also integrated in the INESC TEC research institute, leading the Computing for Embedded and Cyber-Physical Systems area of INESC TEC HumanISE Center.

Laboratory Activities

SoftCPS team members have more than 25 years of research experience in the domain of embedded and cyber-physical systems, software and middleware, with a wide range of national and international activities. Members have been responsible for ISEP participation in more than 25 projects and networks, bringing in for ISEP a total of more than 3 M€ of funding. Among these projects, it is important to note the international recognition of the team, which is perceptible for the coordination of one European Project, and work package leadership in several other European projects. Also, and from a national perspective, the team members have in the past coordinated 2 national projects and have been responsible for several collaborations of ISEP with companies.

The team has published overall more than 200 papers in the area of embedded and cyber-physical systems. Members have also participated in the Organization and Program Committees of numerous international conferences in the area, having had leading roles as conference, program or track chairs of conferences such as the International Conference on Reliable Software Technologies, International Conference on Real-Time Networks and Systems, International conference on Architecture of Computing Systems, the International Conference on Industrial Informatics, the International Conference on Factory Communication Systems and the Annual Conference of the Industrial Electronics Society.

Name: DecisionArts, Inc.
Description:
DecisionArts is a Decision Science company focused on improving the quality and outcomes of end-user decisions across a variety of industry categories. Specifically, DecisionArts focuses on improving the quality, outcome of choices consumers make when engaging with the DecisionArts enabled brand. 


The DecisionArts’ graph-based artificial intelligence model, called Felix, removes unnecessary friction and noise from merchandising, promotion, service delivery and engagement experiences for brands and where applicable, the retailers which may be involved in delivering an experience.
The science is clear. The decisions that humans make are never linear. It is multidimensional and directional, is full of biases and shortcuts and it is rarely fully rational. The process, when visualized, looks nothing like the well recognized ‘decision tree’. Using linear tools and statistical or ‘finite state’ models (LLM) to augment decision making yields rapidly diminishing returns-as many have experienced using recommendation engines or current AI enabled services.
Relying on n-dimensional graph structures which emulate the human mind’s process of information organization and dissemination, DecisionArts enables brands to engage with a greater degree of hyper-personalization, utility and relevance at scale. This helps to ensure the bond between DecisionArts’ brand customers and their customers are maximized across every product offering and experience.Relying on n-dimensional graph structures which emulate the human mind’s process of information organization and dissemination, DecisionArts enables brands to engage with a greater degree of hyper-personalization, utility and relevance at scale. Name: Titanium Workx
Description:
Titanium Workx (TW) was founded in 2000 with a singular mandate: to build and advance the Nix ecosystem in a manner that is truly Open Source, Free, and structurally resilient. The organization exists to strengthen global computational literacy, advance embedded systems engineering, and equip future generations with foundational technological competence.

At Titanium Workx, the focus extends beyond system scalability. We engineer deterministic, hardened platforms, emphasize low-level correctness, and design API integrations capable of operating reliably at planetary scale, supporting billions of devices across heterogeneous environments. Our work prioritizes long-term stability, interoperability, and alignment with fundamental computational principles—treating systems not as disposable software, but as enduring infrastructure.

The organization is led by its founder, Aditya Patange, whose engineering career was forged at XDA Developers, one of the world’s most respected Android and Linux development communities. During this period, he was directly responsible for building and maintaining production-grade kernels for flagship devices including the HTC One V, Samsung Galaxy SL, Samsung Galaxy S Advance, and Samsung Galaxy S3, derived from customized offshoots of the Linux kernel and the Android operating environment.

Titanium Workx operates under a non-negotiable engineering doctrine inspired by the original Linux ethos—correctness over convenience, transparency over abstraction, and freedom over lock-in. The principles associated with the early Linux movement—often referred to as the Linus Torvalds vision—remain embedded in every architectural decision we make.

We do not chase trends.

We build systems that endure.

We scale rapidly, and cover all ground.

And we will not stop.

Name: ME - Mind Engineering
Description:
ME. – Mind Engineering
La Scienza del Comportamento Umano applicata al Business

Fondata da Peppe Quartulli, ME. è la prima realtà italiana dedicata allo studio e all’applicazione del comportamento umano nei processi di crescita aziendale.

Il suo approccio nasce da una convinzione semplice ma rivoluzionaria:

Le aziende non sono bloccate nei processi. Sono bloccate nei comportamenti.

La Mind Engineering combina neuroscienze, psicologia comportamentale e strategia d’impresa per progettare sistemi organizzativi e decisionali più umani, più efficaci e più sostenibili.
Attraverso analisi, formazione e consulenza, ME. aiuta imprenditori, manager e team a comprendere come pensano, decidono e agiscono le persone — e a trasformare questi schemi mentali in comportamenti coerenti con gli obiettivi aziendali.

Cosa fa ME.

- Studia i processi cognitivi e motivazionali che guidano le persone.
- Traduce la scienza del comportamento umano in strumenti pratici per la leadership e la cultura aziendale.
- Costruisce sistemi di crescita basati su comportamenti misurabili, non su intuizioni.
- Supporta le aziende nel creare contesti in cui le persone lavorano con energia, responsabilità e senso di appartenenza.

• Ambiti di intervento

- Leadership e comportamento manageriale
- Cultura organizzativa e motivazione dei team
- Processi decisionali e comunicazione interna
- Customer behavior e decisioni d’acquisto

• Mission

Progettare il comportamento umano per far crescere le imprese.
Ogni miglioramento aziendale parte da un cambiamento nella mente di chi la guida.

Name: FR3ACTION
Description:
We’re building the Symbolic Web on the foundation of our arithmetic discovery, Matrix [0211] — introducing a dual-output logic system that extends beyond the single deterministic output of classical Turing computation.

Our first tool, the Symbolic Finance Engine, creates "receipts with meaning" — enabling retailers to charge symbolic fractions (e.g. 1/5 of stock price) instead of fixed prices, unlocking time-based pricing and meaningful, expressive receipts .

Our second tool, a Decentralized Affiliate Network, lets websites process purchases directly — seamlessly integrated with our finance engine via API.

The idea for fr3action came from blending people operations with computational logic in embedded staffing.

Matrix [0211] is open-source — open to anyone worldwide building toward the Symbolic Web.

 www.fr3action.com

 Innovation Ahead of the Curve

 Broader Compatibility: Works on Android 4.0+ devices (vs. Google's current Pixel-only approach)

The Innovation: Automatically extends screen timeout when user activity is detected, solving the common frustration of screens turning off while you're still reading or viewing content googlegoogle

Name: Sistema Themis
Description:
O Themis é um sistema desenvolvido para monitorar e acompanhar ordens de serviço de ponta a ponta, oferecendo às organizações — públicas e privadas — transparência, eficiência e controle total sobre suas operações.

Desde o momento em que um técnico inicia uma atividade até a geração do relatório final, cada ação é registrada automaticamente em uma linha do tempo clara e intuitiva. Isso significa que todas as etapas ficam documentadas em tempo real: execução de tarefas, envio de fotos, preenchimento de checklists, coleta de assinaturas e validação por parte do responsável.

Esse processo garante relatórios completos e rastreáveis, eliminando falhas comuns em processos manuais, como perda de informações, retrabalho ou falta de evidências. No setor privado, isso se traduz em mais produtividade, redução de custos e maior confiabilidade. Já no setor público, o Themis contribui para governança, transparência e prestação de contas à sociedade, combatendo burocracias e trazendo agilidade à gestão de serviços essenciais.

Mais do que um sistema de relatórios, o Themis é uma plataforma que permite que gestores transformem dados operacionais em decisões estratégicas. Ao acompanhar tudo em tempo real, a empresa ou instituição ganha visibilidade total do fluxo de trabalho, identifica gargalos rapidamente e fortalece a qualidade da entrega.

Em resumo, o Themis é a solução que une monitoramento, organização e inteligência, ajudando qualquer organização a fazer mais com menos esforço, sempre com clareza, segurança e confiabilidade.

NikolApp не е просто приложение с рецепти. Това е дигитален кулинарен асистент, чиято основа е реална професионална кухня. Приложението е обучено изцяло от шеф Никола Симеонов и събира неговите техники, начин на мислене, детайли и „кулинарни инстинкти“, предадени чрез изкуствен интелект директно до потребителя.

Какво означава това на практика?
 готвене стъпка по стъпка в реално време
 чат с виртуалния шеф Никола – въпроси, качване на снимки, корекции
 над 200 авторски рецепти + генериране на нови за секунди
 помощ при грешки и адаптиране на рецептата в движение
 обучение чрез практика, не просто следване на инструкции

NikolApp не събира случайна информация от интернет. Всяка рецепта, съвет и техника минават през филтър от стотици правила за готвене, въведени от шеф Никола Симеонов – така, както той би ги обяснил в реална кухня.

Приложението може да се изтегли напълно безплатно, с възможност за допълнителни функционалности чрез платени планове.

NikolApp е пример за българска иновация с международен потенциал – продукт, в който човек стои в основата на технологията, а не обратното.

What you can do with Ramblr
	•	Turn prompts + schema + context → structured projects, tasks, and assets
	•	Coordinate multi-agent execution with human-in-the-loop control
	•	Automate handoffs across Notion, ClickUp, Slack, email, and webhooks
	•	Build or buy Templates, Agent Packs, and Brain Packs from our marketplace

Vision (2030): become the operating system for AI-driven work, enabling small teams to run complex projects autonomously with agents, orchestrated automations, and collective memory.

Join early access, partner on vertical packs, or explore a private deployment.

 Get in touch to see how Ramblr turns creative intent into shipped outcomes.

Name: NFThunder
Description:
NFThunder was founded in October 2021 as one of the first NFT bots to introduce custom mint modules for exclusive NFT drops.

Initially, the bot operated through a command-line interface (CLI). However, after intensive platform development, it evolved into a sophisticated and user-friendly graphical user interface (GUI).
The product's scope, which originally focused solely on NFT drops, gradually expanded. NFThunder added support for all EVM-compatible chains and Solana, targeting profitable opportunities. Later, it incorporated features for both raffles and DeFi activities.

Thanks to rigorous development efforts and strong community support, NFThunder quickly became one of the most popular minting bots worldwide. It established itself as a pioneer and go-to solution for users looking to acquire on-chain products. This rapid growth and widespread adoption translated into significant financial success: from November 2021 to June 2023, NFThunder generated an impressive $2.2 million in revenue.

In August 2023, NFThunder has been acquired by Eversify, which is now known as Azura.

Name: autologic
Description:
autologic has a vision to power the Complex Logic within every decision, process or interaction inside of any organisation globally. In doing so we want to make the world more efficient.

What we believe
Companies will look to automate every decision they make or interaction they have, no matter how complex, as automation drives

Higher conversion and thus higher revenue
Lower cost and thus better margins
Greater customer satisfaction and thus greater enterprise value
We believe this will always be the case. No company will ever want to take an automated process, decision or interaction and make it more manual, it will only ever go in the other direction. Whilst a growing number of simple logic is already coded and automated, complex logic ie exponentially harder and overwhelming manual.

The option for companies to automate complex logic today is to either

a) code the logic

b) configure off the shelf engines designed for a specific, narrow and known set of logic

Decision automation, conceptually, includes building any kind of system or customer interface where the customer puts in information and the exact ‘answer’ to their question, input, unknown can be returned in the same session instantly.

How will companies automate complex decisions with autologic?
Automation of complex decisions relies on two primary capabilities

Automatically getting/creating reliable sets of data on which the decisions are made
Easily creating and maintaining the Logic (Rules & Calculations) that reflect what decision to make based on the reliable data provided
autologic is the solution to the second point above.

It is a cloud based engine that enables non-technical Analysts to create, maintain, extend and re-use the complex, interdependent rules and calculations that would otherwise be housed in either old 3rd party systems, proprietary legacy code, excel or a mix of all of these.

Name: Najdu Kariéru
Description:
NajduKariéru.cz: Vaše cesta k profesnímu úspěchu 

NajduKariéru.cz je komplexní platforma, která propojuje každého, včetně studentů, s pracovními příležitostmi ve všech fázích jejich kariérního růstu.  Jsme tu proto, abychom Vám pomohli nejen najít praxi, ale také brigádu či získat stabilní zaměstnání v oboru, který Vás opravdu baví. 

 Osobní zkušenost zakladatele
Já jako zakladatel dobře vím, jak důležité je propojení praxe s dalším profesním růstem – a zároveň, jak náročné může být vůbec najít praxi. Z vlastní zkušenosti jsem se naučil, že cesta k úspěšné kariéře často začíná právě praxí. Ta se může postupně proměnit v dlouhodobou brigádu a nakonec vést k trvalému zaměstnání ve stejné firmě. 

 Inovace díky AI
Neustále posouváme hranice možností! Do našich systémů pro firmy jsme implementovali AI funkce, které revolučním způsobem zefektivňují náborový proces.  Tyto funkce pomáhají firmám s filtrováním uchazečů, zpracováním přihlášek a doporučením ideálních kandidátů. Díky tomu je hledání talentů rychlejší, přesnější a efektivnější než kdy dříve.
Pro uchazeče jsme si připravili rychlé AI vyhledávání, které tady ještě nikdy nebylo. 

 Odpověď na problémy a zastaralé přístupy
NajduKariéru.cz vzniklo jako řešení pro:

    Hledání praxe – snadno a efektivně.
    Zastaralý systém hodnocení praxí.

Spojili jsme síly a vytvořili tři platformy v jedné:
1 Najdu Praxi
2 Najdu Brigádu
3 Najdu Zaměstnání

Ať už hledáte první praxi, brigádu během studia , nebo už se připravujete na vstup do pracovního života, naše platforma Vám poskytne všechny potřebné nástroje a možnosti. 

 Naše mise
Naším cílem je stát se Vaším průvodcem na kariérní cestě – od prvních kroků až po dosažení profesního úspěchu.  Budeme s Vámi, ať už hledáte inspiraci, zkušenosti, nebo nové příležitosti.

Pojďte růst s námi a budujte si kariéru, o které sníte!

O APPFONO é uma inovação constante. Nosso compromisso é garantir que você tenha sempre as melhores ferramentas e recursos para gerenciar sua clínica de forma simples e eficiente. Por isso, estamos sempre trabalhando em novas atualizações e funcionalidades, acompanhando as tendências e as necessidades do mercado de saúde.

Name: Draphera
Description:
Draphera is a next-generation platform for digital patternmaking, born from traditional tailoring and reimagined through technology. Designed for creators, schools, and fashion brands, Draphera empowers users to build, edit, and export real-scale sewing patterns directly from the browser—without relying on external CAD software.

From the Leonardo and Burgo construction methods to fully interactive SVG and DXF exports, Draphera bridges craftsmanship and innovation. The system includes a native vector editor, an export engine compatible with industry formats, and upcoming modules for semi-automatic nesting (HPGL2, ISO) and Web3 certification.

Built with a modular, role-based architecture, the platform adapts to:

Creators who want to design and share custom garments

Fashion schools that teach construction step-by-step

Luxury and industrial brands needing ready-to-produce templates

Developers aiming to integrate with CAD, PLM, or e-commerce platforms via API

With DRA, the native utility token, Draphera will enable access to advanced tools, model ownership, and future decentralized governance.

It’s not just about patterns—Draphera is building the foundation of a new digital tailoring standard. Accessible. Scalable. Open.

Name: İNNOVERSE YAZILIM TEKNOLOJİ SANAYİ TİCARET LİMİTED ŞİRKETİ
Description:
İnnoverse: Teknoloji ve Güvenliğin Buluşma Noktası

İnnoverse, güvenlik ve otomasyon teknolojileri alanında yenilikçi çözümler sunan öncü bir firmadır. Müşterilerimize sunduğumuz ürün yelpazesi, biletli otopark sistemlerinden plaka tanıma sistemlerine, araç altı görüntüleme çözümlerinden otopark yönlendirme sistemlerine kadar geniş bir alanı kapsar. Ayrıca, yüz tanıma sistemleri ve bariyer sistemleri gibi ileri teknoloji çözümlerimizle de sektörün ihtiyaçlarına modern yanıtlar sunuyoruz. Her bir ürünümüz, yüksek kalite standartlarında üretilmiş olup, kullanıcılarımızın güvenliği ve konforu için tasarlanmıştır.

Firmamız, sadece mevcut teknolojileri kullanmakla kalmaz, aynı zamanda sektördeki yenilikçi gelişmeleri yakından takip eder ve bu doğrultuda sürekli Ar-Ge yatırımları yapar. Müşterilerimizin karşılaştığı zorlukları anlayarak, onların ihtiyaçlarına en uygun çözümleri sunmayı amaçlarız. Bu yaklaşım, bizi sektörde bir adım öne çıkaran en önemli faktörlerden biridir. Güvenlik ve otomasyon teknolojilerindeki uzmanlığımız, müşterilerimizin iş süreçlerini daha verimli ve güvenli hale getirmelerine yardımcı olur.

İnnoverse olarak, ürünlerimizin kullanıcı dostu olmasına büyük önem veriyoruz. Kolay kurulum ve kullanım özellikleri, müşterilerimizin zamandan ve maliyetten tasarruf etmelerini sağlar. Ayrıca, sunduğumuz teknik destek ve bakım hizmetleri ile müşterilerimizin her zaman yanındayız. Bu sayede, ürünlerimizin performansı ve güvenilirliği konusunda müşterilerimize tam bir güvence sağlıyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyetini en üst seviyede tutmak, bizim için en önemli önceliktir.

Güvenlik sektöründeki teknolojik gelişmeler, sürekli olarak evriliyor ve İnnoverse olarak biz, bu gelişmeleri yakından takip ediyoruz. Geleceğe yönelik vizyonumuz, daha akıllı ve entegre güvenlik çözümleri sunarak, müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarına daha hızlı ve etkili yanıt verebilmektir. Name: Gen SP
Description:
The paradigm has shifted: Informed perspectives on customer business circumstances should drive initial engagements and discovery, not follow it. It’s not enough anymore to start from scratch with buyers.

Yet, most sellers still try to discover their way to value – showing up asking generic questions, gathering basic intel, and offering no insight. That approach is surface-level and too easy for today’s buyers to ignore. Executives need clear alignment to company-level initiatives and challenges, and they want to start those conversations on day one.

You only get one chance to show up differently than the rest and break through the trust barrier with buyers, especially decision makers. 

The science of mapping your capabilities to broader customer initiatives, challenges and macro trends to speculate value and impact used to be a process only applied to strategic accounts and opportunities. Now, the formula can scale to every deal.

 Gen SP’s RapidValue System gives sellers a simple, structured, repeatable way to:
 • Get smart fast on customer business circumstances
 • Synthesize a value perspective grounded in buyer realities
 • Anchor discovery in a POV/Value hypothesis 

The result - Trust and consensus building begin instantly, buyers actually get insight instead of generic discovery, and the path to a refined business case is much easier and shorter.
